(set: $albaRevealed to false)\ (set: $confidence to 70)\ (set: $sobriety to 70)\ (set: $returns to 0)\ (set: $knowsCopperWord to false) (set: $alba1 to "As cool as the pale wet leaves")\ (set: $alba2 to "of lily-of-the-valley")\ (set: $alba3 to "She lay beside me in the dawn.") (set: $albaGiven to (dm: "red", false, "street2", false, "street3", false)) (set: $alba to (a: $alba1, $alba2, $alba3)) (set: $visited to (dm: "French", false, "Pillars", false, "Colony", false)) (set: $metRed to false)\ (set: $knowsLackland to false) (set: $haunts to (a:)) (set: $haunt1 to "The Sketch")\ (set: $haunt2 to "The Refusal")\ (set: $haunt3 to "The Beast")\ (set: $haunt4 to "The Debt")\ (set: $haunt5 to "The Game")\ (set: $haunt6 to "The Delivery")\ (set: $haunt7 to "The Head")\ (set: $haunt8 to "The Wound")\ (set: $knowsCopperSecret to false)\ (set: $completedSetlist to false)\ (set: $hasCoin to false)\ (set: $hasDrawing to false)\ (set: $metShana to false)\ (set: $hasTrishaMatchbook to false)\ (set: $knowsCecilCourt to false)\ (set: $hasCleggBeermat to false)\ (set: $knowsAboutPage to false)\ (set: $hasMissingPage to false)\ (set: $returnedPage to false)\ (set: $mapSeen to false)\ (set: $notebookUnlocked to false)\ (set: $knowsRonnies to false)\ (set: $hadPhoneCall to false)\ (set: $mapPosition to "dean")\ (set: $hadBreather to false)\ (set: $exploredSinceFrench to true)\ (set: $hadChippy to false)\ (set: $frenchDrinkDone to false)\ (set: $drankAtFrench to false)\ (set: $wasBeaten to false)\ (set: $visitedInterval to false)\ (set: $cowRideWon to false)\ (set: $afterMidnight to false)\ (set: $lilyCount to 0) (set: $lilyCallCount to 0)\ (set: $hadLilyCall1 to false)\ (set: $hadDualRing to false)\ (set: $coachUrgent to false) (set: $shownVenueHint to false)\ (set: $shownMoraleWarn to false)\ (set: $tookLily1 to false)\ (set: $tookLily3 to false)\ (set: $tookLily4 to false)\ (set: $tookLily5 to false)\ (set: $sawMemory1 to false)\ (set: $sawMemory2 to false)\ (set: $sawMemory3 to false)\ (set: $awaitingCopperPwd to false)\ (set: $awaitingLacklandPwd to false)\ (set: $breatherReturns to 0)\ (set: $metCritic to false)\ (set: $ronniesLastOrders to false)\ (set: $cecilLastOrders to false)\ (set: $trishasLastOrders to false)\ (set: $hauntExplained to false)\ (set: $hasLiver to false)\ (set: $lastDrink to "")\ (set: $opponent to "")\ (set: $fightScore to 0)\ (set: $oppScore to 0)\ (set: $ppScore to 0) <div id="cp-container"></div>[[·|Centre Point]] <span id="pp-data-opponent" style="display:none;">(print: $opponent)</span> <span id="pp-data-sobriety" style="display:none;">(print: $sobriety)</span> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score" id="score-display">YOU 0 — 0 (print: $opponent)</div> <canvas id="pong-canvas" width="540" height="340"></canvas> <div id="pp-narrative"></div> <div id="pp-game-end"></div> <div id="pp-instructions" style="text-align:center;color:#6a5030;font-size:0.8em;margin-top:0.8em;letter-spacing:0.1em;">Move mouse to control paddle</div> </div> <span id="pp-go-win" style="display:none;">[[Victory|PP Victory]]</span> <span id="pp-go-lose" style="display:none;">[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]</span> <script> (function(){ var opponent = (document.getElementById('pp-data-opponent') || {}).textContent || 'Opponent'; var sobriety = parseInt((document.getElementById('pp-data-sobriety') || {}).textContent) || 55; var W = 540, H = 340; var canvas = document.getElementById('pong-canvas'); var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); var playerScore = 0, oppScore = 0, round = 0; var gameOver = false, paused = false, serving = true, serveTime = Date.now(); var ball = {x:W/2,y:H/2,dx:0,dy:0,r:5,base:3.2}; var pPad = {x:12,y:H/2-35,w:8,h:70}; var oPad = {x:W-20,y:H/2-35,w:8,h:70}; var mouseY = H/2, actualY = pPad.y; var aiTarget = H/2, aiLast = 0; var narr = { 'Jack Curtis':{ win:["Jack Curtis nods. A veteran's approval.","Your shot surprises you both.","Even the poet blinks.","A clean winner. Jack Curtis says nothing."], lose:["Jack Curtis places it where you aren't. He's done this before.","The ball passes you like a rumour.","Jack Curtis smiles, unhurried. A poet's patience.","He reads you like a manuscript."] }, 'Percy Ritson':{ win:["Percy Ritson overcommits. Wild swing, clean miss.","His brilliance undoes him.","Too much angle. Percy Ritson curses.","Speed without direction is just noise."], lose:["Percy Ritson smashes it. You never saw it.","A wild shot that somehow finds the corner.","Percy Ritson whoops. The cellar echoes.","He plays like a man with nothing to lose."] } }; function setupInput(){ function h(cy){var r=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();mouseY=(cy-r.top)*(H/r.height);} canvas.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){h(e.clientY);}); canvas.addEventListener('touchmove',function(e){e.preventDefault();h(e.touches[0].clientY);},{passive:false}); document.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){var r=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();if(e.clientY>=r.top&&e.clientY<=r.bottom)h(e.clientY);}); } function serve(){ ball.x=W/2;ball.y=H/2; var sp=ball.base+round*0.25;var a=(Math.random()-0.5)*0.8;var d=(round%2===0)?-1:1; ball.dx=d*sp*Math.cos(a);ball.dy=sp*Math.sin(a); serving=true;serveTime=Date.now();round++; } function updateScore(){ var el=document.getElementById('score-display'); if(el)el.textContent='YOU '+playerScore+' \u2014 '+oppScore+' '+opponent.toUpperCase(); } function showNarrative(pw){ var lines=pw?narr[opponent].win:narr[opponent].lose; var line=lines[Math.floor(Math.random()*lines.length)]; var el=document.getElementById('pp-narrative'); if(!el)return; el.style.cssText='text-align:center;color:#b8a070;font-size:0.9em;font-style:italic;margin-top:1em;min-height:1.5em;'; el.style.opacity='1';el.textContent=line; if(sobriety<30&&Math.random()<0.4)el.textContent=line+' Your vision swims.'; } function updatePlayer(){ var ty=mouseY-pPad.h/2; if(sobriety<25){ty+=(Math.random()-0.5)*40;if(Math.random()<0.15)return;actualY+=(ty-actualY)*0.06;} else if(sobriety<50){ty+=(Math.random()-0.5)*15;actualY+=(ty-actualY)*0.12;} else{actualY+=(ty-actualY)*0.25;} pPad.y=Math.max(0,Math.min(H-pPad.h,actualY)); } function updateAI(){ var now=Date.now(); if(opponent==='Jack Curtis'){ if(now-aiLast<100)return;aiLast=now; var py=ball.y; if(ball.dx>0){var f=(oPad.x-ball.x)/ball.dx;py=ball.y+ball.dy*f;while(py<0||py>H){if(py<0)py=-py;if(py>H)py=2*H-py;}} py+=(Math.random()-0.5)*20;aiTarget=py; var sp=3.2,c=oPad.y+oPad.h/2,d=aiTarget-c; if(Math.abs(d)>5)oPad.y+=Math.sign(d)*Math.min(sp,Math.abs(d)); }else{ if(now-aiLast<50)return;aiLast=now; var py=ball.y+ball.dy*8;py+=(Math.random()-0.5)*50; if(Math.random()<0.15){var f=ball.dx>0?(oPad.x-ball.x)/ball.dx:30;py=ball.y+ball.dy*f;while(py<0||py>H){if(py<0)py=-py;if(py>H)py=2*H-py;}} aiTarget=py; var sp=5,c=oPad.y+oPad.h/2,d=aiTarget-c; if(Math.abs(d)>3)oPad.y+=Math.sign(d)*Math.min(sp,Math.abs(d)); } oPad.y=Math.max(0,Math.min(H-oPad.h,oPad.y)); } function updateBall(){ if(serving){if(Date.now()-serveTime<800)return;serving=false;} ball.x+=ball.dx;ball.y+=ball.dy; if(ball.y-ball.r<0){ball.y=ball.r;ball.dy=Math.abs(ball.dy);} if(ball.y+ball.r>H){ball.y=H-ball.r;ball.dy=-Math.abs(ball.dy);} if(ball.dx<0&&ball.x-ball.r<=pPad.x+pPad.w&&ball.x+ball.r>=pPad.x&&ball.y>=pPad.y&&ball.y<=pPad.y+pPad.h){ var hp=(ball.y-pPad.y)/pPad.h;var a=(hp-0.5)*Math.PI*0.6; var sp=Math.min(Math.sqrt(ball.dx*ball.dx+ball.dy*ball.dy)*1.05,7); ball.dx=sp*Math.cos(a);ball.dy=sp*Math.sin(a);ball.x=pPad.x+pPad.w+ball.r; } if(ball.dx>0&&ball.x+ball.r>=oPad.x&&ball.x-ball.r<=oPad.x+oPad.w&&ball.y>=oPad.y&&ball.y<=oPad.y+oPad.h){ var hp=(ball.y-oPad.y)/oPad.h;var am=opponent==='Percy Ritson'?0.8:0.6; var a=Math.PI-(hp-0.5)*Math.PI*am; var sp=Math.min(Math.sqrt(ball.dx*ball.dx+ball.dy*ball.dy)*1.05,7); ball.dx=sp*Math.cos(a);ball.dy=sp*Math.sin(a);ball.x=oPad.x-ball.r; } if(ball.x<-20){oppScore++;pointEnd(false);} else if(ball.x>W+20){playerScore++;pointEnd(true);} } function pointEnd(pw){ updateScore();showNarrative(pw);paused=true; if(playerScore>=3||oppScore>=3){endGame(playerScore>=3);return;} setTimeout(function(){paused=false;document.getElementById('pp-narrative').style.opacity='0';serve();},2200); } function endGame(pw){ gameOver=true; var el=document.getElementById('pp-game-end'); var inst=document.getElementById('pp-instructions');if(inst)inst.style.display='none'; if(el){ el.style.cssText='text-align:center;font-family:Courier New,monospace;font-size:1.4em;margin-top:0.5em;min-height:1.5em;'; if(pw)el.innerHTML='<span style="color:#d4a574;text-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(212,165,116,0.7),0 0 30px rgba(180,130,70,0.4);">\u2605 VICTORY \u2605</span>'; else el.innerHTML='<span style="color:#ffaaaa;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,170,170,0.4);">DEFEAT</span>'; } setTimeout(function(){ var sel=pw?'#pp-go-win tw-link':'#pp-go-lose tw-link'; var link=document.querySelector(sel);if(link)link.click(); },2000); } function rRect(x,y,w,h,r){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x+r,y);ctx.lineTo(x+w-r,y);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y,x+w,y+r);ctx.lineTo(x+w,y+h-r);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y+h,x+w-r,y+h);ctx.lineTo(x+r,y+h);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y+h,x,y+h-r);ctx.lineTo(x,y+r);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y,x+r,y);ctx.closePath();} function draw(){ // Table felt — deep tournament green ctx.fillStyle='#0b2212';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H); // Subtle inner frame line ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.setLineDash([]);ctx.strokeRect(8,8,W-16,H-16); // Service mid-line (horizontal) ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.08)';ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(8,H/2);ctx.lineTo(W-8,H/2);ctx.stroke(); // Net — segmented white rectangles var nw=4,nh=7,ng=4,nx=Math.floor(W/2)-Math.floor(nw/2); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(248,248,235,0.72)'; for(var ni=4;ni<H-4;ni+=nh+ng){ctx.fillRect(nx,ni,nw,Math.min(nh,H-ni-4));} // Net post caps (top & bottom) ctx.fillStyle='rgba(248,248,235,0.9)';ctx.fillRect(nx-1,0,nw+2,5);ctx.fillRect(nx-1,H-5,nw+2,5); // Edge vignette — top/bottom var ev=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,H);ev.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)');ev.addColorStop(0.14,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');ev.addColorStop(0.86,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');ev.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)');ctx.fillStyle=ev;ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H); // Edge vignette — sides var eh=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,W,0);eh.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,0,0,0.38)');eh.addColorStop(0.12,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');eh.addColorStop(0.88,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');eh.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0.38)');ctx.fillStyle=eh;ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H); // Player paddle — white/cool glow ctx.shadowColor='rgba(190,210,255,0.85)';ctx.shadowBlur=20;ctx.fillStyle='#dce8f4';rRect(pPad.x,pPad.y,pPad.w,pPad.h,3);ctx.fill(); // Opponent paddle — red with amber rim glow ctx.shadowColor='rgba(220,70,30,0.75)';ctx.shadowBlur=18;ctx.fillStyle='#bf2c14';rRect(oPad.x,oPad.y,oPad.w,oPad.h,3);ctx.fill(); // Ball — white with strong glow ctx.shadowColor='rgba(255,255,220,1.0)';ctx.shadowBlur=22;ctx.fillStyle='#f2ede0';ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(ball.x,ball.y,ball.r,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill(); ctx.shadowBlur=0; // Drunk radial vignette if(sobriety<30){var dg=ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2,H/2,H*0.3,W/2,H/2,H*0.7);dg.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');dg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)');ctx.fillStyle=dg;ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H);} if(serving){ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,248,200,0.55)';ctx.font='13px Courier New';ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.fillText('\u00b7 \u00b7 \u00b7',W/2,H/2+40);} } function loop(){ if(!gameOver){if(!paused){updatePlayer();updateAI();updateBall();}draw();requestAnimationFrame(loop);} else{draw();} } setupInput();serve();updateScore();loop(); })(); </script> (set: _divHTML to '<div class="deco-divider"><svg viewBox="0 0 300 32" width="100%" height="32" style="display:block;margin:0.6em auto;max-width:420px;overflow:visible"><defs><linearGradient id="ddArm" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#d4a574" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#d4a574" stop-opacity="0.6"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#d4a574" stop-opacity="0.6"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#d4a574" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="8" y1="16" x2="118" y2="16" stroke="url(#ddArm)" stroke-width="1.2"/><line x1="8" y1="18.5" x2="118" y2="18.5" stroke="url(#ddArm)" stroke-width="0.4"/><line x1="182" y1="16" x2="292" y2="16" stroke="url(#ddArm)" stroke-width="1.2"/><line x1="182" y1="18.5" x2="292" y2="18.5" stroke="url(#ddArm)" stroke-width="0.4"/><path d="M150,3 L162,16 L150,29 L138,16 Z" fill="none" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M150,7 L158,16 L150,25 L142,16 Z" fill="none" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M150,10.5 L155,16 L150,21.5 L145,16 Z" fill="#d4a574" opacity="0.15"/><circle cx="150" cy="16" r="1.5" fill="#d4a574" opacity="0.55"/><line x1="150" y1="3" x2="150" y2="7" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.4"/><line x1="150" y1="25" x2="150" y2="29" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.4"/><line x1="138" y1="16" x2="142" y2="16" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.4"/><line x1="158" y1="16" x2="162" y2="16" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M127,16 L131,12 L135,16 L131,20 Z" fill="none" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M165,16 L169,12 L173,16 L169,20 Z" fill="none" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.45"/><line x1="150" y1="5" x2="145" y2="1" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.25"/><line x1="150" y1="5" x2="155" y2="1" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.25"/><line x1="150" y1="27" x2="145" y2="31" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.25"/><line x1="150" y1="27" x2="155" y2="31" stroke="#d4a574" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.25"/><circle cx="120" cy="16" r="1" fill="#d4a574" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="180" cy="16" r="1" fill="#d4a574" opacity="0.35"/></svg></div>')\ (print: _divHTML) (set: $hasLiver to false)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 22)\ (set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 18)\ <script>setTimeout(function(){ if(window.showLiverPopup) window.showLiverPopup(); }, 200);</script>\ (go-to: "Dean Street") (set: _bells to 5 - $lilyCount)\ (set: _sobrClass to (cond: $sobriety < 20, ' lily-drowning', $sobriety < 40, ' lily-fading', $sobriety < 60, ' lily-dimming', ''))\ (set: _svgHTML to '<div class="lily-prompt' + _sobrClass + '"><svg class="lily-icon-svg lily-bells-' + (text: _bells) + '" viewBox="0 0 85 95" ><defs><radialGradient id="lyBell" cx="50%" cy="30%" r="65%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f0e8dc" stop-opacity="0.9"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#d8cec0" stop-opacity="0.45"/></radialGradient></defs><path d="M16 90 Q14 58, 20 38 Q28 16, 45 6 Q56 -2, 66 4 Q72 8, 70 16" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M16 90 Q4 65, 10 45 Q14 56, 18 72 Z" fill="#5a7a4a" opacity="0.7"/><path d="M10 52 Q12 60, 16 66" fill="none" stroke="#4a6a3a" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M16 90 Q26 66, 24 48 Q20 56, 17 72 Z" fill="#6a8a5a" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M24 54 Q22 62, 18 68" fill="none" stroke="#4a6a3a" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.4"/><g class="lily-bell-1"><path d="M69 14 Q70.5 17, 69 21" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M69 21 Q65 23.5, 63.5 28 Q65 30.5, 67.5 29 Q68.5 30.5, 70.5 29.5 Q72 30.5, 73.5 28 Q72 23.5, 69 21 Z" fill="url(#lyBell)" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M66 25 Q68.5 27, 71 25" fill="none" stroke="#d8cec0" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="68.5" cy="29" r="0.5" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.3"/></g><g class="lily-bell-2"><path d="M62 6 Q64 11, 62.5 15.5" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M62.5 15.5 Q58 18, 56.5 23.5 Q58.5 25.5, 61 24 Q63 26, 65.5 24.5 Q67.5 25.5, 68.5 23.5 Q67 18, 62.5 15.5 Z" fill="url(#lyBell)" opacity="0.55"/><path d="M59 19.5 Q62 21.5, 65 19.5" fill="none" stroke="#d8cec0" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="62" cy="24.5" r="0.5" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.35"/><path d="M61 18 L60.5 21" fill="none" stroke="#c8baa8" stroke-width="0.25" opacity="0.3"/><path d="M64 18 L64.5 21" fill="none" stroke="#c8baa8" stroke-width="0.25" opacity="0.3"/></g><g class="lily-bell-3"><path d="M52 6 Q54.5 13, 55.5 17.5" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M55.5 17.5 Q50.5 21, 49 27 Q51 29.5, 54 28 Q56 30, 58.5 28.5 Q60.5 29.5, 62 27 Q61 21, 55.5 17.5 Z" fill="url(#lyBell)" opacity="0.65"/><path d="M52 22 Q55.5 24, 59 22" fill="none" stroke="#d8cec0" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.45"/><circle cx="55.5" cy="28.5" r="0.6" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M54 20 L53.5 23.5" fill="none" stroke="#c8baa8" stroke-width="0.25" opacity="0.35"/><path d="M57 20 L57.5 23.5" fill="none" stroke="#c8baa8" stroke-width="0.25" opacity="0.35"/></g><g class="lily-bell-4"><path d="M42 12 Q44.5 21, 46.5 27.5" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M46.5 27.5 Q41.5 31, 40 37 Q42.5 39.5, 45.5 38 Q47.5 40, 50 38.5 Q52 39.5, 53 37 Q52 31, 46.5 27.5 Z" fill="url(#lyBell)" opacity="0.8"/><path d="M43 32 Q46.5 34, 50 32" fill="none" stroke="#d8cec0" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="46.5" cy="38.5" r="0.7" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M44.5 30 L44 34" fill="none" stroke="#c8baa8" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.35"/><path d="M48.5 30 L49 34" fill="none" stroke="#c8baa8" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.35"/></g><g class="lily-bell-5"><path d="M34 22 Q36 31, 37.5 37.5" fill="none" stroke="#7a9a6a" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M37.5 37.5 Q32.5 41, 31 47 Q33.5 49.5, 36.5 48 Q38.5 50, 41 48.5 Q43 49.5, 44 47 Q43 41, 37.5 37.5 Z" fill="url(#lyBell)" opacity="0.75"/><path d="M34 42 Q37.5 44, 41 42" fill="none" stroke="#d8cec0" stroke-width="0.35" opacity="0.45"/><circle cx="37.5" cy="48.5" r="0.6" fill="#d4b8e0" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M35.5 40 L35 43.5" fill="none" stroke="#c8baa8" stroke-width="0.25" opacity="0.3"/><path d="M39.5 40 L40 43.5" fill="none" stroke="#c8baa8" stroke-width="0.25" opacity="0.3"/></g></svg></div>')\ (print: _svgHTML) <div class="ronnies-scene"> <div class="ronnies-spot"></div> <div class="ronnies-cone"></div> <svg class="ronnies-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 20" width="100%" height="20" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="rnG" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6888b8" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="22%" stop-color="#8aacdc" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#aac8f0" stop-opacity="0.90"/><stop offset="78%" stop-color="#8aacdc" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6888b8" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="rnGd" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="75%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><!-- Warm stage-light bleed above the main rule --><radialGradient id="rnSpill" cx="50%" cy="100%" r="60%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e8c060" stop-opacity="0.18"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e8c060" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><!-- Stage-light spill glow above the rule --><rect x="30" y="0" width="240" height="22" fill="url(#rnSpill)"/><!-- Fine upper shadow line --><line x1="0" y1="18" x2="300" y2="18" stroke="url(#rnGd)" stroke-width="0.7"/><!-- Main bright rule --><line x1="0" y1="22" x2="300" y2="22" stroke="url(#rnG)" stroke-width="2.2"/><!-- Subtle secondary line beneath --><line x1="0" y1="25" x2="300" y2="25" stroke="url(#rnGd)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Small diamond at centre — like a stage footlight marker --><polygon points="150,19 153,22 150,25 147,22" fill="#aac8f0" opacity="0.7"/><!-- Two flanking dots --><circle cx="100" cy="22" r="1.2" fill="#8aacdc" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="200" cy="22" r="1.2" fill="#8aacdc" opacity="0.5"/></svg> Wild Turkey. Good. **What glass?** [[Tumbler (wide, heavy)|RS Glass Wrong]] [[Tulip glass (small, curved)|RS Glass Right]] [[Highball (tall)|RS Glass Wrong]] (display: "Ronnies Rule SVG h14") </div> <div 183,47 180,50 177,47" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="95" cy="47" r="0.8" fill="#8a9a50" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="205" cy="47" r="0.8" fill="#8a9a50" opacity="0.35"/></svg> (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 8) He's wearing a suit that was probably clean this morning, which means he's been home and changed, but now it's beginning to crumple in sympathy with his mood. 'Not interested,' he says. His audience, in parallel, is you, all skittish-pissed and needy, and the whole roiling gross of humanity, from Adam Kadmon's day to his own, wherein a man still seeks a viable interlocutor. The accent is Anglo-Antipodean; too clipped and politic to be functional downunder, yet here in the imperial core, it strays audibly at its burnt edges into an outback. 'I read last night in Oxford. Magnificent, actually. Met a girl; pretty woman, working on a D.Phil. at Magdalen, on Shakespeare and Co. She said she'd meet me today at the Pillars.' He drinks so you drink and landing his glass he seems to clock you for the first time again, as he draws the whole, traversable world into his intimate sphere. 'I got a bottle of claret and waited at the Pillars,' he proceeds, spitting whispers. 'She showed, sure enough. She showed and she didn't touch a drop of it. So she left and I left and now here I am.' You're hushed. Even his silence leaves you no room to speak. 'Listen. I know what you're wanting and it's not me you're after, but let me give you advice. Do you know Martin Lackland? Office on Frith Street?' [[Yes, the name…]] [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <svg class="colony-fan-bottom" viewBox="0 0 300 52" width="100%" height="52" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><clipPath id="cf2"><rect x="0" Q11,5 15,3" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="3" cy="3" r="2.5" fill="none" stroke="#8a9a50" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.6"/><circle cx="3" cy="3" r="1" fill="#c8b860" opacity="0.55"/><circle cx="3" cy="3" r="0.4" fill="#e0d080" opacity="0.4"/></svg> <svg class="colony-corner bl" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><path d="M3,34 L3,8 Q3,3 8,3 L34,3" fill="none" stroke="#6a9a50" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/><path d="M7,34 L7,12 Q7,7 12,7 L34,7" fill="none" stroke="#8a7a28" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M3,8 Q1,14 4,18 Q6,14 3,8" fill="#5a8a40" opacity="0.25"/><path d="M8,3 Q14,1 18,4 Q14,6 8,3" fill="#5a8a40" opacity="0.25"/><path d="M3,8 Q5,11 3,15" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M8,3 Q11,5 15,3" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="3" cy="3" r="2.5" fill="none" stroke="#8a9a50" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.6"/><circle cx="3" cy="3" r="1" fill="#c8b860" opacity="0.55"/><circle cx="3" cy="3" r="0.4" fill="#e0d080" opacity="0.4"/></svg> <svg class="colony-corner br" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><path d="M3,34 L3,8 Q3,3 8,3 L34,3" fill="none" stroke="#6a9a50" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/><path d="M7,34 L7,12 Q7,7 12,7 L34,7" fill="none" stroke="#8a7a28" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M3,8 Q1,14 4,18 Q6,14 3,8" fill="#5a8a40" opacity="0.25"/><path d="M8,3 Q14,1 18,4 Q14,6 8,3" fill="#5a8a40" opacity="0.25"/><path d="M3,8 Q5,11 3,15" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M8,3 Q11,5 15,3" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="3" cy="3" r="2.5" fill="none" stroke="#8a9a50" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.6"/><circle cx="3" cy="3" r="1" fill="#c8b860" opacity="0.55"/><circle cx="3" cy="3" r="0.4" fill="#e0d080" opacity="0.4"/></svg> The mention of the name shocks you sober, instantly, then giddies you up to your drink again, as quickly, and being so fast makes it double. 'I know him well.' You do. You used to wake up on the sofa in his mother's house in Highbury, when you were both twenty-two. She was a patient woman and preternaturally kind, who let you sleep there with your whisky when you couldn't go home. 'Go to see Lackland, he's surely expecting you. But don't hang about in his office, get through to the back: the password's //Valletta//. You didn't hear it from me. I'm not here. I'm in Oxford, being adored.' (if: $knowsCopperSecret is false)[<div class="item-box"> <div class="item-header">⚿ PASSWORD LEARNED</div> <div class="item-name">"Valletta"</div> </div>] (set: $knowsCopperSecret to true)\ (set: $knowsLackland to true) You surface upon Dean Street. [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] </div> (set: $hadBreather to true)\ (set: $breatherReturns to $returns + 1)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 18)\ (if: $hadChippy is true)[(set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 8)](else:)[(set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 18)]\ <script>setTimeout(function(){ if (window.showSpewPopup) window.showSpewPopup(); }, 300);</script>\ (go-to: "Dean Street") (if: $albaRevealed is true)[\ (set: _count to 0)\ (if: $alba contains $alba1)[(set: _count to _count + 1)] (if: $alba contains $alba2)[(set: _count to _count + 1)] (if: $alba contains $alba3)[(set: _count to _count + 1)] (set: _albaClass to "alba-tracker")\ (if: _count >= 1)[(set: _albaClass to _albaClass + " alba-glow-" + (text: _count))] (set: _html to "<div class='" + _albaClass + "'><strong>ALBA</strong>")\ (if: $alba contains $alba1)[(set: _html to _html + "<em class='alba-line'>" + (text: $alba1) + "</em>")] (if: $alba contains $alba2)[(set: _html to _html + "<em class='alba-line'>" + (text: $alba2) + "</em>")] (if: $alba contains $alba3)[(set: _html to _html + "<em class='alba-line'>" + (text: $alba3) + "</em>")] (if: _count is 3)[(set: _html to _html + "<strong class='alba-complete'>THE ALBA IS COMPLETE &mdash; SEEK THE DAWN</strong>")] (set: _html to _html + "</div>")\ (print: _html)\] <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> (set: $metShana to true) Her lovers are always speechless, beautiful, women who seem to be chosen more for their natural indifference to words, than shocked into silence, like her male companions. She doesn't look up but knows you're there because she has read the Angelic Keys of Edward Kelly, and has such a talent for practical magick. Drinks land on the table, all whiskys, one for each of her five companions and somehow one more for you. She is yet to look up. 'Give it here,' she says. <span class="guided-link">[[Hand over the manuscript|Shana Reads]]</span> [[I'd rather not|Shana Refused]] (display: "French Rule SVG h60") There, sitting quietly at a table in the corner, you spot what you're after. He's a novelist now, though you've known him since he was only a poet. Between the ground you've taken and his position falls an amber monolith, through the window onto Dean Street; a thick and molten bar on the gnarly floor, light and apart. If you lingered in it you'd become a fossil, like the filoplume of a silent dinosaur. You once told him that he should stick to poems. So now, have you got anything to lose? [[Nothing|The novelist]] (link: "Everything")[(set: $confidence to $confidence - 9)(go-to: "Dean Street")] (display: "French Rule SVG h24")</svg> (if: ($drankAtFrench is false) and ($haunts contains $haunt4) and (not (($haunts contains $haunt1) and ($haunts contains $haunt2))))[(go-to: "Which drink at the French?")]\ <div id="fh-container"></div>[[·|The French]] <div id="ch-container"></div>[[·|Coach and Horses lock]] <div id="ph-container"></div>[[·|Entering The Pillars of Hercules]] <div id="lo-container"></div>[[·|Martin Lackland's Office]] <div id="ga-container"></div>[[·|At the Corner of Dean Street and Greek Street]] <div id="cr-container"></div>[[·|The Colony Room Door]] <div id="rs-container"></div>[[·|Ronnie Scott's]] <div id="cl-container"></div>[[·|Turn to Copper]] <!-- Ginger light --> <div class="ginger-lamp-wrap"> <svg width="60" height="110" viewBox="0 0 60 110"><ellipse cx="30" cy="33" rx="40" ry="30" fill="rgba(200,100,5,0.10)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="31" rx="24" ry="18" fill="rgba(220,130,10,0.18)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="29" rx="13" ry="10" fill="rgba(255,190,60,0.22)"/><polygon points="27,2 30,0 33,2 32,7 28,7" fill="rgba(60,38,4,0.96)"/><path d="M13,7 Q30,4 47,7 L44,13 L16,13 Z" fill="rgba(60,38,4,0.96)"/><path d="M16,13 L44,13 L40,44 L20,44 Z" fill="rgba(130,75,8,0.45)" stroke="rgba(90,52,4,0.65)" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M19,15 L41,15 L37,42 L23,42 Z" fill="rgba(255,165,35,0.42)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="29" rx="7" ry="10" fill="rgba(255,232,130,0.55)"/><ellipse cx="30" cy="27" rx="3" ry="4" fill="rgba(255,250,210,0.68)"/><rect x="22" y="44" width="16" height="6" rx="2.5" fill="rgba(60,38,4,0.96)"/><rect x="27" y="50" width="6" height="60" rx="2" fill="rgba(45,28,3,0.90)"/></svg> </div> <div class="ginger-scene"> <div class="ginger-light"></div> A man, not much past twenty, stands under a ginger light. At first you think he must be a dilly boy. He wears a beret and paints his nails; he is epicene and crinoline, as if he might snap at any moment. Then you clock him for a poet that you know. A poet called Red. Like a tiger in the Taiga, moving strong and low through heavy blizzard, whose footprints fill as soon as they are made, what Red leaves of himself on the street is trackless at your shutter-speed; he is a bundle of scents and in proximity gives an impression of the weightless bergs of ash he calves into the puddle at his feet, which, even when they should be extinguished, are, by some feeling wind, awakened to a transitory brightness. You stand nearby for a while; he is somewhere far off, elsewhere. [[Speak to him|You speak to the poet]] </div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> (set: $wasBeaten to true) 'I don't talk to liars,' he roars, when a voice hollers from the staircase: 'Salvu! Leave it! He's alright.' It's John St. John. 'I know him. I don't like the bloke but he's sound.' St. John's face is legible only to you, who once knew him so well. He's amused at your straits, both pleased that you're in them, and miffed that it falls upon him to rescue you, again. (if: $metRed is true)[He leans close as he pulls you to your feet: 'Red told Copper you had money.' You're lucky, you reflect, that Copper could work out you don't.] (if: $knowsCopperWord)[Copper turns his back and before he does, he takes from his pocket a book of matches and gives them to John St. John, who gives them to you. 'Well,' says John. 'That went better than anyone expected.' (set: $hasTrishaMatchbook to true) <div class="item-box"> <div class="item-header">◈ OBJECT ACQUIRED</div> <div class="item-name">Trisha's Matchbook</div> </div> [[Try Trisha's|Failure: Trisha's]]] (else:)[[[He has something to tell you|St. John's Word]]] </div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> 'Lackland's got a secret room. The word's //Valletta//,' says John as he marshals you out. 'Next time knock on the right door.' (set: $confidence to $confidence - 9) (if: $knowsCopperSecret is false)[(set: $knowsCopperSecret to true) <div class="item-box"> <div class="item-header">⚿ PASSWORD LEARNED</div> <div class="item-name">"Valletta"</div> </div>] You surface upon Dean Street. r="5" fill="none" stroke="#6a8a70" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M335,32 Q340,28 345,32" fill="none" stroke="#6a8a70" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.3"/><path d="M335,32 Q340,36 345,32" fill="none" stroke="#c8a050" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.3"/><line x1="110" y1="23" x2="110" y2="32" stroke="#c8a050" stroke-width="0.45" opacity="0.3"/><line x1="108" y1="26" x2="112" y2="26" stroke="#c8a050" stroke-width="0.45" opacity="0.3"/><path d="M128,36 Q131,32 134,36 L131,44Z" fill="none" stroke="#c8a050" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.25"/><path d="M238,18 Q242,21 238,24 Q244,21 238,18Z" fill="#c8a050" fill-opacity="0.2" stroke="#c8a050" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.3"/><text x="258" y="42" font-size="7" fill="#c8a050" opacity="0.25" font-family="serif">𓂀</text><circle cx="360" cy="15" r="1" fill="#c8a050" opacity="0.2"/></svg> <h2 class="venue-title">Cecil Court</h2> A light's on late in Cecil Court, leeching its scrumpy amber into the fog that settles between the shopfronts. This is the Booksellers' street. In dimmed windows you glimpse the things you covet: first impressions with uncorrected misprints, presentation copies and pirated stuff. On your way to the amber light you pass by Watkins, longtime tenants at numbers 19-21; hoary purveyor of the occult and the esoteric. (link: "⟡ LORE: Watkins ⟡")[<div class="lore-box"> John Watkins, an ecumenical occultist bookseller and associate of Madame Blavatsky, opened the shop in 1901. His son Geoffrey ran it after him and, as of 1973, has only just retired; though he still haunts the place, like his father does. Cecil Court is known in the trade as Death Row. The origin of that name is far from certain, but it is, probably, traceable at least to Dr. Johnson's The Rambler, wherein he remarks on the tendency of the alleyway, for such it was then, to gather, after rain, though it was some way from the river, the corpses of cats and wild geese. Crowley came here and Yeats, Waite and Mathers. Mozart sold tickets to his shows from the shop at number nine. It is a dangerous bookshop. </div>] [[Look in|Watkins]] First you see only yourself reflecting on the window; but let a moment pass, then things fizz down to clarity, like when the bubbles resolve on the tonic. A waltz strikes up, twice-muffled, as if it came both from inside the bookshop and your own inner ear. You watch: from the stockroom, brassy figures emerge, lifesized and dancing; it is Madame Blavatsky, she is waltzing with the Beast. [[Waltz on to the light|O'Flatterly's shop]] The sign reads: I. O'FLATTERLY, dealer in books. You go in. Inis O'Flatterly sits at the thick wooden counter, reading what he's reading. He does not look up to greet you, yet neither does his shop lack welcome. [[I was sent by Percy Ritson|O'Flatterly introduction]] <div id="fc-container"></div>[[·|Chinese Fish and Chips]] <div class="venue-back-btn">(link: "← Dean Street")[(go-to: "Dean Street")]</div> <div class="chippy-scene"> <div class="chippy-light top"></div> <div class="chippy-light bottom"></div> <svg class="chippy-tube" viewBox="0 0 300 18" width="100%" height="18" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><filter id="fgA" x="-20%" y="-120%" width="140%" height="400%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter></defs><!-- Cold blue outer glow --><rect x="14" y="1" width="272" height="16" rx="6" fill="rgba(180,210,255,0.22)" filter="url(#fgA)"/><!-- Tube body — harsh cold white with blue tint --><rect x="16" y="4" width="268" height="10" rx="4" fill="rgba(215,230,255,0.96)"/><!-- Bright core stripe --><rect x="18" y="6" width="264" height="4" rx="2" fill="rgba(240,248,255,1.0)"/><!-- End caps — grey metal --><rect x="12" y="3" width="7" height="12" rx="2" fill="rgba(130,135,145,0.75)"/><rect x="281" y="3" width="7" height="12" rx="2" fill="rgba(130,135,145,0.75)"/><!-- Faint internal line suggesting the fluorescent tube --><line x1="22" y1="9" x2="278" y2="9" stroke="rgba(200,220,255,0.4)" stroke-width="0.7"/></svg> (set: $hadChippy to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 14)\ (set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 18) You find it after some looking, where you always knew it was: the Chinese Fish and Chips. You're eating at the counter when somebody passes the window: that's Lily. (if: $tookLily1 is false)[|lily1>[(display: "Lily SVG")]\ (click-replace: ?lily1)[(set: $lilyCount to $lilyCount + 1)(set: $tookLily1 to true)(display: "Lily SVG")<span class="lily-glimpse lily-fade">That must be her, as tall as the Amazon; her joints articulate how you remember.</span>]](else:)[<div class="lily-taken">(display: "Lily SVG")</div>] (link: "Eat.")[<script>setTimeout(function(){ window.showEatPopup('chips'); }, 200);</script>(go-to: "Dean Street")] <svg class="chippy-tube" viewBox="0 0 300 18" width="100%" height="18" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><filter id="fgB" x="-20%" y="-120%" width="140%" height="400%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge></filter></defs><rect x="14" y="1" width="272" height="16" rx="6" fill="rgba(180,210,255,0.22)" filter="url(#fgB)"/><rect x="16" y="4" width="268" height="10" rx="4" fill="rgba(215,230,255,0.96)"/><rect x="18" y="6" width="264" height="4" rx="2" fill="rgba(240,248,255,1.0)"/><rect x="12" y="3" width="7" height="12" rx="2" fill="rgba(130,135,145,0.75)"/><rect $hadLilyCall1 is false)[(set: $lilyCallReturn to "Coach and Horses lock")(go-to: "Lily phone call 1")]\ (if: $lilyCount >= 2 and $hadLilyCall1 is true and $hadDualRing is false)[(set: $lilyCallReturn to "Coach and Horses lock")(go-to: "The dual ring")]\ <svg class="coach-beam" viewBox="0 0 300 36" width="100%" height="36" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="wdA" x1="0" cy="18" r="4" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="250" cy="17" r="1.5" fill="#ffe090" opacity="0.35"/></svg> (set: $visitedCoach to true)\ (set: $afterMidnight to true)\ <h2 class="venue-title">The Coach and Horses</h2> <svg class="coach-beam-bottom" viewBox="0 0 300 36" width="100%" height="36" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="wdC" x1="0" x2="1"><stop stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7a5220" stop-opacity="0.2"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="0" y="6" width="300" height="24" fill="url(#wdC)"/><rect x="0" y="6" width="300" height="24" fill="url(#wdGrain2)"/><line x1="0" y1="6" x2="300" y2="6" stroke="url(#wdD)" stroke-width="1.2"/><line x1="0" y1="30" x2="300" y2="30" stroke="url(#wdD)" stroke-width="1.2"/><line x1="0" y1="18" x2="300" y2="18" stroke="url(#brB)" stroke-width="1.5"/><g opacity="0.4" stroke="#7a5220" stroke-width="0.4" fill="none"><line x1="35" y1="6" x2="33" y2="30"/><line x1="85" y1="6" x2="87" y2="30"/><line x1="135" y1="6" x2="134" y2="30"/><line x1="165" y1="6" x2="166" y2="30"/><line x1="215" y1="6" x2="213" y2="30"/><line x1="265" y1="6" x2="267" y2="30"/></g><circle cx="50" cy="18" r="4" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="50" cy="17" r="1.5" fill="#ffe090" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="150" cy="18" r="4.5" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.55"/><circle cx="150" cy="17" r="1.8" fill="#ffe090" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="250" cy="18" r="4" fill="#c8922a" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="250" cy="17" r="1.5" fill="#ffe090" opacity="0.35"/></svg> You've come-to in a cubicle, in what you think is the Gents toilet in the Coach and Horses. (link: "Recover.")[(set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 12)<span class="inventory-note">&#9734; SOBRIETY +12</span><script>setTimeout(function(){ window.showSpewPopup(); }, 200);</script>] You gather your limbs to the bar. The place is empty except for Jeffrey Bernard and, tall under the optics, his cow. 'You don't look well,' he says. 'Have you seen my cow?' You heft your eyes to admire it, as he desires. He seems, for a moment, confused, then, owling his head in the direction you're looking, cries, 'There she is!' She moos; he drinks. 'And I don't want that book you've got, either. Speak to Lackland, he'll be about. You best find your own way out.' (set: $knowsLackland to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 6) //&#91;insert sponsored drink&#93;// (link: "Drink it.")[(set: $confidence to $confidence + 22)(set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 4) <span class="inventory-note">&#9734; CONFIDENCE +22 | SOBRIETY −4</span> <script>setTimeout(function(){ window.showDrinkPopup('champagne'); }, 200);</script>] 'Will you do something about this cow?' Said Jeffrey Bernard. You take its bridle. It sneezes. When you look back he's disappeared to a timeshare on the seacoast of Bohemia. (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt3))[ (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt3)) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE BEAST</div> <div class="haunt-description">Is it New York or New Year?</div> </div> (if: $haunts's length is 1)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we will call the marks 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them. <div class="notebook-hint">↗ Saved to your notebook</div> <div class="notebook-hint">Collect more haunts to unlock the map.</div> </div>]] What will you do with his cow? The Colony Room tilts. (if: $knowsCopperSecret is false)[Near the bar, a man in a clean, crumpled suit drinks alone. [[Sit with him|Davy Merkin]]] [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <svg class="colony-fan-bottom" viewBox="0 0 300 52" width="100%" height="52" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><clipPath id="cf2"><rect fill="#c8b860" opacity="0.6"/><polygon points="150,42 153,45 150,48 147,45" fill="#e0d080" opacity="0.2"/><polygon points="120,44 123,47 120,50 117,47" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.4"/><polygon points="180,44 183,47 180,50 177,47" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="95" cy="47" r="0.8" fill="#8a9a50" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="205" cy="47" r="0.8" fill="#8a9a50" opacity="0.35"/></svg> (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 9) He's wearing a suit that was probably clean this morning, which means he's been home and changed, but now it's beginning to crumple in sympathy with his mood. 'Not interested,' he says. His audience, in parallel, is you, all skittish-pissed and needy, and the whole roiling gross of humanity, from Adam Kadmon's day to his own, wherein a man still seeks a viable interlocutor. The accent is Anglo-Antipodean; too clipped and politic to be functional downunder, yet here in the imperial core, it strays audibly at its burnt edges into an outback. 'I read last night in Oxford. Magnificent, actually. Met a girl; pretty woman, working on a D.Phil. at Magdalen, on Shakespeare and Co. She said she'd meet me today at the Pillars.' He drinks so you drink and landing his glass he seems to clock you for the first time again, as he draws the whole, traversable world into his intimate sphere. 'I got a bottle of claret and waited at the Pillars,' he proceeds, spitting whispers. 'She showed, sure enough. She showed and she didn't touch a drop of it. So she left and I left and now here I am.' You're hushed. Even his silence leaves you no room to speak. 'Listen. I know what you're wanting and it's not me you're after, but let me give you advice. Do you know Martin Lackland? Office on Frith Street?' The mention of the name shocks you sober, instantly, then giddies you up to your drink again, just as quickly, and being so fast makes it double. 'I know him well.' You do. You used to wake up on the sofa in his mother's house in Highbury, when you were both twenty-two. She was a patient woman and preternaturally kind, who let you sleep there with your whisky when you couldn't go home. 'Go to see Lackland, he's surely expecting you. But don't hang about in his office, get through to the back: the password's //Valletta//. You didn't hear it from me. I'm not here. I'm in Oxford, being adored.' (if: $knowsCopperSecret is false)[<div class="item-box"> <div class="item-header">⚿ PASSWORD LEARNED</div> <div class="item-name">"Valletta"</div> </div>] (set: $knowsCopperSecret to true)\ (set: $knowsLackland to true) [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <svg class="colony-fan-bottom" viewBox="0 0 300 52" width="100%" height="52" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><clipPath id="cf2"><rect x="0" r="0.8" fill="#8a9a50" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="205" cy="47" r="0.8" fill="#8a9a50" opacity="0.35"/></svg> </div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> (set: $confidence to $confidence + 18) Salvu Copper's face droops under the heat of his internal furnace. 'So someone's looking after you? That's enough,' he says. Quiet Frankie lifts his hand without looking. Ashton Granger is happy you're alive. He presses a book of matches into your hand: 'Tell Trisha I sent you.' (set: $hasTrishaMatchbook to true) [[Try Trisha's|Failure: Trisha's]] </div> (set: $awaitingCopperPwd to false)\ <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> You say the words you were given. Copper's eyebrows freeze as they are rising, and in the throttling of momentum seem to rise above themselves, like ghosts, in placid supplication. Then his masseters, their wreck-head sneer, become again the tyrants in his visage. 'I see. We'll have it soft then. But you still knocked on my door, lad.' He's closer. Quiet Frankie won't look up but Ashton Granger has; she stops doodling. [[Brace yourself|Fight starts]] </div> (set: $awaitingCopperPwd to false)\ <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> Copper gets closer. 'I asked you a question,' he says. Quiet Frankie still hasn't looked up but Ashton Granger has; she's stopped doodling. [[Try to run for the stairs|Fight starts]] [[Stand your ground|Stand your ground]] </div> <div class="ending-pane">London is all before you: Tyburn, Bloomsbury, Fitzrovia; St. Giles, at your feet; and Soho, which has dulled your soul and dressed you for the sun in midnight's cloak, throbs low and still, its bruised capillaries. You found the poem, the path to dawn's bleak Albion. Traveller, wake! [[Go!|Dawn Approach White]]</div> <div class="glass-pane">You see yourself walking to meet you, he looks at you, with a pitying grin, then turns and heads, quickly, towards Centre Point. [[Follow him|Approach Centre Point]] [[Not yet. Back to the night.|Dean Street]]</div> <div class="ending-pane ending-pane-dim">London is all before you: Tyburn, Bloomsbury, Fitzrovia; St. Giles, at your feet; and Soho, which has dulled your soul and dressed you for the sun in midnight's cloak, throbs low and still, its bruised capillaries. You did not find the poem. The dawn will come regardless. Traveller, sleep! [[Go!|Dawn Approach Black]]</div> (if: ($alba contains $alba1) and ($alba contains $alba2) and ($alba contains $alba3))[(go-to: "Alba Complete")](else:)[(go-to: "Alba Incomplete")] (set: $alba to (a: $alba1, $alba2, $alba3)) (go-to: "White page") <div class="ending-pane"><div class="dawn-title">THE DAWN</div>Here you are, on Dean Street again, watching the light as it peels through its changes. First cobalt; then the brassic crown that grows rich and gilded; then the antiseptic mint while the corolla rises and blooms through the lobes (frontal, parietal, temporal, occipital), the blue-blooded, hemorrhaging sky. Then the cool white quivering lip of the dawn's bells and flowers when they're trying to settle. You have been awake for so long. From the impossible door, Lackland emerges and cries, 'Tomorrow! Tomorrow!' as he crabwalks himself to a cab. Yes, maybe tomorrow but till then you'll lie with Aoifa and she'll lie with you, and together you'll raise a daughter. Better not tomorrow. (set: _albaComplete to ($alba contains $alba1) and ($alba contains $alba2) and ($alba contains $alba3))(if: _albaComplete)[<div class="alba-final"> <em>$alba1</em> <em>$alba2</em> <em>$alba3</em> </div>](if: not _albaComplete)[<div class="alba-final"> <em>You didn't find the poem, but the dawn comes regardless.</em> </div>] <span id="dawn-petal-trigger">And the last weight peeled from the dawn is as breathlike as a petal of the lily-of-the-valley which, caught on a thermal, is rising plum into the sun, till the days settles up and it's lost. You've forgotten the name of that flower.</span> </div> (set: $awaitingLacklandPwd to false)\ <svg id="dean-lamp-svg" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="145" height="400" style="float:right;margin:0.3em -0.5em 1em 0.8em;overflow:hidden;"><defs><radialGradient id="dslamp" cx="55%" cy="5%" r="65%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#d4a060" stop-opacity="0.7"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="#c89060" stop-opacity="0.35"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#c89060" stop-opacity="0.12"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c89060" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><rect x="-40" y="-80" width="240" height="340" fill="url(#dslamp)"/><g fill="none" stroke="#c8a86a" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="90" y1="32" x2="90" y2="38" stroke-width="1.8"/><circle cx="90" cy="42" r="4" stroke-width="2.0"/><line x1="90" y1="46" x2="90" y2="56" stroke-width="1.8"/><line x1="90" y1="56" x2="68" y2="68" stroke-width="2.5"/><line x1="90" y1="56" x2="112" y2="68" stroke-width="2.5"/><line x1="66" y1="68" x2="114" y2="68" stroke-width="2.3"/><line x1="68" y1="68" x2="68" y2="104" stroke-width="2.3"/><line x1="112" y1="68" x2="112" y2="104" stroke-width="2.3"/><line x1="66" y1="104" x2="114" y2="104" stroke-width="2.3"/><line x1="90" y1="68" x2="90" y2="104" stroke-width="1.4"/><line x1="68" y1="86" x2="112" y2="86" stroke-width="1.4"/><path d="M90,104 L72,178 L100,238" stroke-width="3.0"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="240" rx="13" ry="4" stroke-width="1.8"/><line x1="100" y1="246" x2="100" y2="9999" stroke-width="3.8"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="385" rx="13" ry="4" stroke-width="1.8"/><ellipse cx="100" cy="530" rx="13" ry="4" stroke-width="1.8"/><rect x="84" y="692" width="32" height="8" rx="2" stroke-width="1.8"/></g></svg> <h1 class="game-title" style="font-size:1.7em;">DREAM STREET<span style="display:block;height:0.15em;"></span>SHUFFLE</h1> {<!-- BOOLEAN GUARDS: ensure vars are correct types on first visit (added §1.1) --> (unless: $alba is an array)[(set: $alba to (a:))] (unless: $haunts is an array)[(set: $haunts to (a:))] (unless: $bookTitle is a string)[(set: $bookTitle to "Untitled Manuscript")] (if: $bookTitle is "")[(set: $bookTitle to "Untitled Manuscript")] (unless: $metCritic is a boolean)[(set: $metCritic to false)] (unless: $ronniesLastOrders is a boolean)[(set: $ronniesLastOrders to false)] (unless: $cecilLastOrders is a boolean)[(set: $cecilLastOrders to false)] (unless: $trishasLastOrders is a boolean)[(set: $trishasLastOrders to false)] (unless: $hauntExplained is a boolean)[(set: $hauntExplained to false)] (unless: $afterMidnight is a boolean)[(set: $afterMidnight to false)] <!-- VISIT COUNTER --> (set: $returns to $returns + 1) <!-- STAT CLAMPS: keep confidence and sobriety within 0–100 --> (if: $confidence > 100)[(set: $confidence to 100)] (if: $confidence < 0)[(set: $confidence to 0)] (if: $sobriety > 100)[(set: $sobriety to 100)] (if: $sobriety < 0)[(set: $sobriety to 0)] (if: $sobriety <= 0 and $haunts's length >= 3)[(set: $coachUrgent to true)](else-if: $sobriety <= 0)[(set: $sobriety to 5)] <!-- DERIVED FLAGS: computed each visit --> (set: _towerReady to ($alba contains $alba1) and ($alba contains $alba2) and ($alba contains $alba3))\ (if: $wasBeaten is true and $visitedInterval is true)[<span class="fetch-glimpse">You see him then: yourself, walking ahead of you down Greek Street toward Centre Point. He does not look back. He walks the way a man walks when he has made a decision. You know where he is going. You have always known.</span>] (if: $returns >= 7 and $afterMidnight is false)[(set: $afterMidnight to true)] } <span class="scene-date">(if: $afterMidnight)[24.11.73](else:)[23.11.73]</span> <span class="scene-location">Dean Street, Soho, London.</span> (if: $returns is 2 and $hasCoin is false)[(set: $hasCoin to true)<div id="coin-overlay"><div class="coin-overlay-box"><div class="coin-overlay-stage"><div class="coin-overlay-disc" id="coin-overlay-disc"><div class="cp-face cp-heads"></div><div class="cp-face cp-tails"></div></div></div><p class="coin-overlay-text">You found a coin on the pavement; a rare one, called a &#39;Donkey&#39;. There&#39;s only one. Pocket it. You&#39;ll want it later.</p><span class="inventory-note">&#9734; COIN ACQUIRED</span><button class="coin-overlay-btn" id="coin-toss-btn">Toss it</button><span class="coin-overlay-result" id="coin-overlay-result"></span><button class="coin-overlay-btn coin-overlay-dismiss" id="coin-keep-btn" style="display:none">Pocket it</button></div></div><script>(function(){var tossCount=0,maxToss=2,stage=document.querySelector(".coin-overlay-stage");var sequence=[false,true];function sparks(){for(var i=0;12>i;i++){var s=document.createElement("div");s.className="cp-spark";var a=Math.random()*360,dist=60+Math.random()*40;s.style.setProperty("--sx",(Math.cos(a*Math.PI/180)*dist)+"px");s.style.setProperty("--sy",(Math.sin(a*Math.PI/180)*dist)+"px");s.style.animationDelay=(Math.random()*0.3)+"s";s.style.animationDuration=(0.5+Math.random()*0.5)+"s";stage.appendChild(s);setTimeout(function(el){el.remove();},(1200),s);}}document.getElementById("coin-toss-btn").addEventListener("click",function(){var d=document.getElementById("coin-overlay-disc"),r=document.getElementById("coin-overlay-result"),b=this,o=document.getElementById("coin-overlay");if(d.classList.contains("cp-flipping"))return;if(window.dssAudio)window.dssAudio.coinFlip();var heads=sequence[tossCount];tossCount++;var endDeg=heads?"1440deg":"1620deg";var restDeg=heads?"0deg":"180deg";d.style.setProperty("--cp-end",endDeg);d.classList.remove("cp-flipping");void d.offsetWidth;d.classList.add("cp-flipping");sparks();r.textContent="";b.classList.add("coin-btn-hidden");setTimeout(function(){r.textContent=heads?"Heads.":"Tails.";d.style.transform="rotateX("+restDeg+")";d.classList.remove("cp-flipping");if(tossCount>=maxToss){setTimeout(function(){o.classList.add("coin-overlay-fade");setTimeout(function(){o.remove();},800);},1800);}else{setTimeout(function(){r.textContent="";b.classList.remove("coin-btn-hidden");b.textContent="Toss again";var kb=document.getElementById("coin-keep-btn");if(kb)kb.style.display="inline-block";},2200);}},2000);});var keepBtn=document.getElementById("coin-keep-btn");if(keepBtn){keepBtn.addEventListener("click",function(){var o=document.getElementById("coin-overlay");if(o){o.classList.add("coin-overlay-fade");setTimeout(function(){o.remove();},800);}});}var ov=document.getElementById("coin-overlay");if(ov){ov.addEventListener("click",function(e){if(e.target===ov&&tossCount>0){ov.classList.add("coin-overlay-fade");setTimeout(function(){ov.remove();},800);}});}})();</script>]\ \ |deanIntro>[A heavy afternoon lingers in rainfall on the pavements though the sky has cleared now and the newborn night is cut with moonshine. There is an atmosphere of the silver screen: as if Brando might emerge in a tight and sodden T-shirt, from any door or alleyway, anytime.] In your bag, you have //(print: $bookTitle)//, your novel, in manuscript. It will help you reach the things you really need. (if: $returns > 1)[(enchant: ?deanIntro, (text-colour: "#4a4a4a") + (css: "opacity:0.6"))] (if: $metRed is false and _towerReady is false and $coachUrgent is false)[Someone's on the corner. [[See who's there|Approach The Ginger Light]]] (if: $metRed is true)[\ (if: _towerReady)[<div class="choice-box"><span class="guided-link">[[The dawn is coming|Approach Centre Point]]</span></div>](else-if: $coachUrgent is true)[<div class="choice-box">'[Noises off. Blackout.]' <span class="guided-link">[[The Coach and Horses|Approach The Coach]]</span></div>](else:)[Where now? (if: $returns >= 2 and $visited's French is true and $shownVenueHint is false)[(set: $shownVenueHint to true)<script>setTimeout(function(){ if(window.venueHintPopup) window.venueHintPopup(); }, 300);</script>] (if: $returns >= 3 and $confidence < 30 and $sobriety < 30)[<div class="choice-box">You're in a bad way. Get some grub, find a doorway, catch your breath.</div>](else-if: $returns >= 3 and $confidence < 40)[<div class="choice-box">Your confidence is slipping. Find somewhere to gather yourself.</div>](else-if: $returns >= 3 and $sobriety < 40)[<div class="choice-box">You've had a few too many. You could use some food to soak it up.</div>]] (if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and not (($haunts contains $haunt4) and ($haunts contains $haunt1) and ($haunts contains $haunt2)))[[[To The French|Approach The French]] (if: $haunts contains $haunt4)[<span class="hp hp-done">◆</span>](else:)[<span class="hp">◇</span>](if: $haunts contains $haunt1)[<span class="hp hp-done">◆</span>](else:)[<span class="hp">◇</span>](if: $haunts contains $haunt2)[<span class="hp hp-done">◆</span>](else:)[<span class="hp">◇</span>] ](if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and ($haunts contains $haunt4) and ($haunts contains $haunt1) and ($haunts contains $haunt2))[<span class="greyed-out">The French &#91;DONE FOR TONIGHT&#93;</span> ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $visited's French is true and $hadPhoneCall is true and $metCritic is false)[[[The Pillars — there was someone you wanted to talk to|Maritime interlude]] (if: $metCritic is true)[<span class="pp pp-done">▲</span>](else:)[<span class="pp pp-pending">△</span>](if: $haunts contains $haunt6)[<span class="hp hp-done">◆</span>](else-if: $knowsCecilCourt is true)[<span class="hp">◇</span>](else:)[<span class="hp hp-pending">◇</span>] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $visited's French is true)[[[To The Pillars of Hercules|Maritime interlude]] (if: $metCritic is true)[<span class="pp pp-done">▲</span>](else:)[<span class="pp pp-pending">△</span>](if: $haunts contains $haunt6)[<span class="hp hp-done">◆</span>](else-if: $knowsCecilCourt is true)[<span class="hp">◇</span>](else:)[<span class="hp hp-pending">◇</span>] ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $visited's French is true)[[[Try the Colony Room|Approach The Colony Room]] (if: $haunts contains $haunt5)[<span class="hp hp-done">◆</span>](else:)[<span class="hp">◇</span>] ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $knowsRonnies is true and (not ($visited is a datamap and $visited contains "Ronnies" and $visited's Ronnies is true)))[[[Hear the jazz at Ronnie Scott's|Approach Ronnie Scott's]] (if: $haunts contains $haunt7)[<span class="hp hp-done">◆</span>](else:)[<span class="hp">◇</span>] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $knowsRonnies is true)[<span class="greyed-out">Ronnie Scott's &#91;CLOSED&#93;</span> ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $knowsLackland is true and $knowsCopperSecret is true)[[[Go to Lackland's Office|Approach Lacklands Office]] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $knowsLackland is true)[<span class="greyed-out">Lackland's Office &#91;NOT NOW. TRY ELSEWHERE&#93;</span> ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $knowsCecilCourt is true and $hasMissingPage is true and $returnedPage is false)[[[Return the page to O'Flatterly|O'Flatterly introduction]] (if: $haunts contains $haunt6)[<span class="hp hp-done">◆</span>](else:)[<span class="hp">◇</span>] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and class="hp">◇</span>] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $knowsCecilCourt is true and $returnedPage is false)[[[Visit the antiquarian in Cecil Court|Cecil Court Approach]] (if: $haunts contains $haunt6)[<span class="hp hp-done">◆</span>](else:)[<span class="hp">◇</span>] ](if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $returnedPage is true and ($cecilLastOrders is false))[(set: $cecilLastOrders to true)[[Cecil Court &#91;LAST ORDERS&#93;|Cecil Court]] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $returnedPage is true)[<span class="greyed-out">Cecil Court &#91;CLOSED&#93;</span> ]\ (if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and $hasTrishaMatchbook is true and not ($haunts contains $haunt8))[[[Try Trisha's|Failure: Trisha's]] (if: $haunts contains $haunt8)[<span class="hp hp-done">◆</span>](else:)[<span class="hp">◇</span>] ](if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and ($haunts contains $haunt8) and ($trishasLastOrders is false))[(set: $trishasLastOrders to true)[[Trisha's &#91;LAST ORDERS&#93;|Failure: Trisha's]] ](else-if: $coachUrgent is false and _towerReady is false and ($haunts contains $haunt8))[<span class="greyed-out">Trisha's &#91;CLOSED&#93;</span> ]\ (if: _towerReady is false and $coachUrgent is false and ($alba contains $alba1) and ($alba contains $alba2) and not ($alba contains $alba3))[<div class="choice-box"><span class="guided-link">[[The voice|The Fetch]]</span></div> ]\ (if: _towerReady is false and $coachUrgent is false and $sobriety < 40 and $hadBreather is false and $visited's Pillars is true and $hadChippy is false)[<div class="choice-box">You should have gone to the Gents when you had the chance. Look for a doorway. [[Step into the doorway|A Doorway on Dean Street]]</div>]\ (if: _towerReady is false and $coachUrgent is false and $hadChippy is true and $hadBreather is false)[<div class="choice-box">[[Find another doorway|A Doorway on Dean Street]]</div>]\ (if: _towerReady is false and $coachUrgent is false and $confidence < 50 and $hadChippy is false)[<div class="choice-box">If you're in a bad way, there's a place you know called the Chinese Fish and Chips. [[Get some grub|Approach Chinese Fish and Chips]]</div>](else-if: _towerReady is false and $coachUrgent is false and $hadChippy is true and $tookLily1 is false)[<div class="choice-box">[[Back to the chippy — there was something you missed|Approach Chinese Fish and Chips]]</div>](else-if: _towerReady is false and $coachUrgent is false and $hadChippy is true)[<span class="greyed-out">Get some grub</span> ]\ (if: _towerReady is false and $coachUrgent is false and ($confidence < 10 or $sobriety < 10) and $hasLiver is true)[<div class="choice-box">'Perhaps you should eat Shelley's liver. It's in your notebook.'</div>]\ (if: _towerReady is false and $coachUrgent is false and $confidence <= 5)[[[Give up on the night|No more]] ]\ ]\ (set: $notebookUnlocked to true) <svg class="carthage-pyre" viewBox="0 0 500 95" width="100%" height="95" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><radialGradient id="cpGlow" cx="50%" cy="85%" r="70%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#d4600a"
