x="232" y="63" width="32" height="3" rx="1" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M264,63 L266,63 L266,58 L264,58 Z" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M267,63 L269,63 L269,59 L267,59 Z" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.45"/><circle cx="245" cy="4" r="0.8" fill="#ffa030" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="260" cy="7" r="0.6" fill="#ff8020" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="238" cy="10" r="0.7" fill="#ffc050" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="268" cy="3" r="0.5" fill="#ff6010" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="252" cy="2" r="0.6" fill="#ffc050" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="230" cy="6" r="0.5" fill="#ff8020" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="272" cy="12" r="0.9" fill="#ffa030" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="242" cy="16" r="0.5" fill="#ffc050" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="256" cy="14" r="0.4" fill="#ff6010" opacity="0.25"/><rect x="80" y="30" width="5" height="47" fill="#705848" opacity="0.45"/><rect x="78" y="28" width="9" height="3" rx="0.5" fill="#806858" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M82,45 L84,55" stroke="#3a2010" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="70" y="74" width="9" height="4" rx="1" fill="#705848" opacity="0.3" transform="rotate(-15,74,76)"/><rect x="405" y="22" width="6" height="55" fill="#705848" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="402" y="20" width="12" height="3" rx="0.5" fill="#806858" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M408,35 Q410,42 407,50 Q410,58 408,65" fill="none" stroke="#d4600a" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.2"/><path d="M415,72 Q420,65 430,72" fill="none" stroke="#705848" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.3"/><rect x="140" y="48" width="3" height="29" fill="#503828" opacity="0.25"/><rect x="350" y="42" width="3" height="35" fill="#503828" opacity="0.2"/><path d="M348,42 L356,42" stroke="#503828" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.15"/><circle cx="180" cy="82" r="0.8" fill="#d4600a" opacity="0.25"/><circle cx="320" cy="80" r="0.6" fill="#c84a08" opacity="0.2"/><circle cx="160" cy="84" r="0.5" fill="#ff8020" opacity="0.15"/><circle cx="340" cy="83" r="0.7" fill="#d4600a" opacity="0.2"/><rect x="0" y="0" width="500" height="95" fill="url(#cpTopFade)"/><rect x="0" y="0" width="500" height="95" fill="url(#cpFade)"/></svg> On the pyre, Dido is burning where she has burnt for 2,000 years. The scent of her sour embers says something about the lily of the valley. 'Stay,' she says, 'My Carthage is meant for you. Lily is in her valley and will not return. Rest here and think no more about your England.' (link: "⟡ LORE: Her Dying Words ⟡")[<div class="dido-words"><span class="latin">Littora littoribus contraria, fluctibus undas<br> Impresor: arma armis: pugnent ipsig nepotes:<br> Liue false Æneas, truest Dido dyes,<br> Sic sic inuat ire sub umbras.</span> <hr class="didoRule"> <span class="english">Shores against shores; waves, waves;<br> I curse, arms against arms, you and your children.<br> Live false Aeneus, truest Dido dies,<br> So, so happily I go, under shades.</span></div>] (if: $knowsAboutPage is true and $hasMissingPage is false)[Among the flames, you see something that shouldn't be there — a page, curling at the edges but not yet consumed. The writing on it shifts and writhes. [[Reach into the flames|Rescue the page]]] (if: $confidence <= 15)[[[Remain in Carthage|Stay in Carthage]] (if: $haunts's length >= 3 or $hasCoin is true)[[[Try The Green Sea|Green Sea Approach]]](else:)[//You must not, yet, go any deeper inland.//] [[Return to the shore|The coast of Carthage]]] (else:)[Not yet. The game's not played to death. (if: $haunts's length >= 3 or $hasCoin is true)[[[Go back to shore|Carthage shore]]](else:)[[[Wake from this dream|Dream to Dean]]]] (if: $lilyCount >= 1 and $hadLilyCall1 is false)[(set: $lilyCallReturn to "Entering The Pillars of Hercules")(go-to: "Lily phone call 1")]\ (if: $lilyCount >= 2 and $hadLilyCall1 is true and $hadDualRing is false)[(set: $lilyCallReturn to "Entering The Pillars of Hercules")(go-to: "The dual ring")]\ <div class="pillars-scene"> <div class="pillars-light"></div> <div class="pillars-smoke"></div> <div class="pillars-dust"><span style="left:12%;bottom:18%;animation-duration:7s;animation-delay:0s;"></span><span style="left:32%;bottom:8%;animation-duration:9.5s;animation-delay:1.2s;"></span><span style="left:52%;bottom:28%;animation-duration:6.5s;animation-delay:2.8s;"></span><span style="left:72%;bottom:5%;animation-duration:11s;animation-delay:0.4s;"></span><span style="left:22%;bottom:38%;animation-duration:8.5s;animation-delay:1.8s;"></span><span style="left:82%;bottom:22%;animation-duration:10s;animation-delay:3.5s;"></span><span style="left:42%;bottom:12%;animation-duration:7.8s;animation-delay:0.8s;"></span><span style="left:62%;bottom:32%;animation-duration:9s;animation-delay:2.2s;"></span></div> <!-- Left broken pillar — Piranesi/Decline & Fall style --> <svg class="pillar left" viewBox="0 0 34 280" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMax meet"><defs><linearGradient id="pf" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.72"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.42"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><!-- Two-step plinth base --><rect x="1" y="252" width="32" height="8" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><rect x="4" y="246" width="26" height="7" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Shaft edges (slight taper: 24px wide at top, 26px at base) --><line x1="5" y1="246" x2="6" y2="88" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><line x1="29" y1="246" x2="28" y2="88" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><!-- Drum course bands every 22px --><line x1="5.3" y1="110" x2="28.7" y2="110" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="132" x2="28.5" y2="132" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="154" x2="28.5" y2="154" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="176" x2="28.5" y2="176" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="198" x2="28.5" y2="198" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="220" x2="28.5" y2="220" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="242" x2="28.5" y2="242" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><!-- Faint fluting --><line x1="10" y1="88" x2="10" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="14" y1="88" x2="14" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="17" y1="88" x2="17" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="20" y1="88" x2="20" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="24" y1="88" x2="24" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><!-- Echinus (curved capital swell) --><path d="M6,88 Q5,78 3,72 L31,72 Q29,78 28,88" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><!-- Abacus slab — CRACKED, left portion collapsed inward --><!-- Right surviving portion: tilting down-left --><path d="M12,72 L32,68 L33,63 L13,66 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><!-- Left fallen piece: a slab lying at an angle, partly off the shaft --><path d="M2,74 L-2,70 L8,67 L11,72 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.45"/><!-- Fracture line across shaft top --><path d="M6,88 L9,83 L13,87 L17,80 L21,86 L25,79 L28,88" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.55"/><!-- A fallen drum section leaning against the shaft at ~1/3 height --><path d="M1,168 L3,160 L9,162 L9,170 L3,172 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.85" opacity="0.32"/><!-- Crack on shaft face --><path d="M13,130 L15,142 L12,150" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.28"/><!-- Rubble at base --><path d="M3,255 L9,255 L10,260 L2,260 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.28"/><path d="M21,257 L28,257 L29,262 L20,261 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M13,260 L18,259 L19,264 L12,263 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.2"/></svg> <!-- Right pillar — same shape, scaleX(-1) mirrors it so break faces inward --> <svg class="pillar right" viewBox="0 0 34 280" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMax meet"><defs><linearGradient id="pf2" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.72"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.42"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="1" y="252" width="32" height="8" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><rect x="4" y="246" width="26" height="7" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Shorter shaft: top at y=130 instead of y=88 — this pillar more ruined --><line x1="5" y1="246" x2="6" y2="130" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><line x1="29" y1="246" x2="28" y2="130" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><line x1="5.5" y1="152" x2="28.5" y2="152" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="174" x2="28.5" y2="174" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="196" x2="28.5" y2="196" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="218" x2="28.5" y2="218" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="240" x2="28.5" y2="240" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="10" y1="130" x2="10" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="14" y1="130" x2="14" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="17" y1="130" x2="17" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="20" y1="130" x2="20" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="24" y1="130" x2="24" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><!-- Echinus at top of shorter shaft --><path d="M6,130 Q5,120 3,114 L31,114 Q29,120 28,130" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><!-- This column: abacus has COLLAPSED entirely — jagged stump and tilted block --><path d="M3,114 L6,107 L10,112 L14,104 L18,110 L22,102 L27,108 L31,114" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><!-- Large fallen capital block --><path d="M2,106 L-3,98 L14,94 L17,104 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/><!-- Fracture running down shaft --><path d="M6,130 L9,125 L13,129 L17,122 L21,128 L25,121 L28,130" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.55"/><path d="M9,142 L11,158 L8,164" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.28"/><!-- Fallen drum leaning against shaft --><path d="M1,215 L3,207 L9,209 L9,217 L3,219 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.85" opacity="0.3"/><!-- Rubble at base --><path d="M3,255 L9,255 L10,260 L2,260 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.28"/><path d="M22,257 L29,257 L30,262 L21,261 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M11,260 L17,259 L18,264 L10,263 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.2"/></svg> <!-- Lattice pub window at top --> <svg class="pillars-lattice" viewBox="0 0 300 36" width="100%" height="36" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="latEdge" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><pattern id="dLat" x="0" y="0" width="42" height="24" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><path d="M7,0 L14,12 L7,24 L0,12 Z" fill="rgba(160,35,25,0.26)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M21,0 L28,12 L21,24 L14,12 Z" fill="rgba(185,215,235,0.07)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M35,0 L42,12 L35,24 L28,12 Z" fill="rgba(28,108,52,0.22)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/></pattern><mask id="latMask"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" fill="url(#latEdge)"/></mask></defs><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" fill="url(#dLat)" mask="url(#latMask)"/><line x1="0" y1="34" x2="300" y2="34" stroke="url(#latEdge)" stroke-width="1.2"/></svg> (unless: $visited is a datamap)[(set: $visited to (dm:))]\ (unless: $visited contains "Pillars")[(set: $visited's Pillars to false)]\ (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 9)\ (set: $exploredSinceFrench to true)\ (if: $visited's Pillars is false)[(set: $visited's Pillars to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 12)]\ When you pass the Pillars' threshold you've already made your choice. Whatever more you choose comes out in the wash: <div class="verse">Hobson has supt, and 's newly gon to bed.</div> (if: $hadPhoneCall is false)[The phone behind the bar rings. The barman calls your name. [[Answer the phone|The phone call]]] (else:)[Through the fumes, vapours and drink, you recognise a man. (if: $metCritic is true)[ <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ THE GREAT HAM ⟡</strong> ''Editor's note:'' When Dr. Johnson, the harmless drudge and titan nonpareil among the London's literati in the mid-eighteenth century, was at the height of his powers, he was called the Great Cham. (Cham being a variant of Khan, that is: supreme leader). When Ian Hamilton occupied a similar position, two centuries later, nobody (I am sadly but reliably informed) bestowed on him the obvious sobriquet. Here I intend to fix that. </div> [[Talk to The Great Ham|Talk to the critic]]](else:)[[[Talk to the halfcut literary critic|Talk to the critic]]]] </div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> You bolt for the stairs. Copper shouts something but you're already gone, back through the Colony Room door and onto Dean Street. Your hands are shaking. Your jaw hurts. But you're still standing. [[Dean Street|Dean Street]] </div> (if: $hasTrishaMatchbook is true)[The doorman's saying no tonight. You're about to fuck off, politely, when you think of the matchbook. You give it him. 'Jack Curtis,' he says. 'Not a question. Come in.' [[Enter Trisha's|Trisha's]]]\ (else:)[(set: $confidence to $confidence - 11) They do not know you. [[Dean Street|Dean Street]]] <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-lose">🥊 DOWN 🥊</span></div> </div> You're floored and Copper stands over you, barely moved. He feints a final attack then it pulls back, or is pulled back, like a beast who's reached the full length of its chain. [[Try to get up|Beaten]] <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-win">🥊 STANDING 🥊</span></div> </div> Copper stumbles. This will go no further; though Quiet Frankie has begun to feel for his knife. (if: $knowsCopperWord)['I'm glad he turned you my way,' says Copper, now utterly composed. He presses a book of matches into your hand: 'Tell them Salvu sent you.' (set: $confidence to $confidence + 18) (set: $hasTrishaMatchbook to true) [[Try Trisha's|Failure: Trisha's]]] (else:)[Copper falls about laughing. 'Well done, lad! I'm sorry you picked the wrong door but that was very well played; I enjoyed it. Now sod off but don't worry; you know me and I always remember a face.' (set: $confidence to $confidence + 12) [[Escape up the stairs|Escape success]]] (set: $fightScore to 0)\ <span id="sob-data" style="display:none;">(print: $sobriety)</span> <div id="pre-fight"> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score">🥊 THE CELLAR 🥊</div> </div> 'Three rounds,' says Copper. 'More than most get.' <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:1em;"> <button id="fight-start-btn" onclick="window.startFightGame()" style="background:#1a0a08;color:#d4a574;border:1px solid #8a4a3a;padding:8px 24px;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:1em;cursor:pointer;">Take your stance</button> </div> </div> <div id="fight-arena" style="display:none;"> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score" id="round-display">🤜 PRACTICE 1/3 🤜</div> <canvas id="fight-canvas" width="560" height="400" style="display:block;width:100%;height:100%;cursor:crosshair;"></canvas> <div id="fight-narrative" style="text-align:center;padding:0.5em;min-height:2.5em;font-style:italic;color:#d4a574;transition:opacity 0.3s;"></div> <div id="fight-end" style="text-align:center;padding:0.5em;font-family:Courier New,monospace;font-size:1.4em;"></div> <div id="fight-instructions" style="text-align:center;color:#5a4a3a;font-size:0.75em;margin-top:0.5em;letter-spacing:0.1em;">Click a zone to dodge, block, or counter</div> </div> </div> <span id="go-fight-victory" style="display:none;">[[Victory|Fight Victory]]</span> <span id="go-fight-defeat" style="display:none;">[[Defeat|Fight Defeat]]</span> <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> She knocks //(print: $bookTitle)// to the floor and then very carefully places it back on the table, being certain to alter the page that it fell on. She reads. 'What's wrong with it?' she asks. [[What?|Shana's Verdict]] <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> 'Wise,' she says. 'Or cowardly. The two are so often the same thing wearing different hats.' She waves you away. A flick of the wrist; a whole dismissal in the gesture. The circle closes behind you like water. (set: $confidence to $confidence - 9) [[Back to the bar|Trisha's]] <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> 'Nothing,' she says. 'That's the thing. Nothing is wrong with it. It's just nothing.' She pushes it back towards you. You return it to your bag like something injured. 'I love you but you need to get to work. Bring it to me six months down the line.' (set: $confidence to $confidence + 12) [[Take the manuscript|After Shana]] <div class="trishas-frame"> <span class="trishas-strip">· · · · · · · · · ·</span> You lift a heavier bag because you are weaker, less than you were. But six months is an age, the kid will be walking by then. You smile and you leave. (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt8))[ (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt8)) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE WOUND</div> <div class="haunt-description">She saw through you. That's a gift.</div> </div> (if: $haunts's length is 1)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we will call the marks 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them. <div class="notebook-hint">↗ Saved to your notebook</div> <div class="notebook-hint">Collect more haunts to unlock the map.</div> </div>]] [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <div class="haunt-tracker"> <strong>HAUNTS</strong> (if: $haunts contains $haunt1)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt1</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Sketch</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt2)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt2</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Refusal</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt3)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt3</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Beast</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt4)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt4</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Debt</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt5)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt5</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Game</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt6)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt6</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Delivery</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt7)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt7</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Head</div>] (if: $haunts contains $haunt8)[<div class="haunt-collected">⬖ $haunt8</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ The Wound</div>] </div> (display: "French Rule SVG h24")</svg> (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 9)\ You nod; he orders two whisky-sodas. Clocking first, his face, then your own in a pier glass behind him, you observe that you both look much older than you should, had you aged normally or healthily in the time since you stopped speaking. His slate eyes shine like slate does after cold rain. 'You're selling,' he says. 'I saw you buttering Red.' John St. John (for that is his name) is another poet. He hates Red. His rancour took seed in the days when they both used same the upstairs room in a Bloomsbury pub as their office. (link: "⟡ LORE: On Red and John St. John ⟡")[<div class="lore-box"><p>There is a cleaving-apart in English poetics, much as there is in philosophy, which derives from a difference of opinion about the French and the Germans. Where Red isn't English, he is mostly French. He is Arthur Rimbaud on Charing Cross Road and his poems enact their dérive among the fragments of Mallarmé and Laforgue that Eliot shored up against the ruins in which the Great War left Europe.</p> <p>In //Socialism: Utopian and Scientific// (1880), Friedrich Engels differentiates between socialists for whom socialism is mostly about acting to make the world better for those who live in it, who are often English, and those whose socialism is rooted in a scientific understanding of 'will', as an abstract, impersonal force, subject to the laws of dialectics, not Christian morality.</p> <p>Red doesn't know it, but he is of the scientific party. John St. John, on the other hand, is an English poet, in the way that the Coverdale Bible is an English Bible.</p></div>] (display: "French Rule SVG h24")</svg> [[Drink with him|The Empty Glass]] <span class="empty-glass-marker" style="display:none"></span> (display: "French Rule SVG h24")</svg> <script>setTimeout(function(){ window.showDrinkPopup('whisky'); }, 400);</script>\ After these thoughts you drink and as you drink you notice that John's glass is drunk. He drops it; it smashes. 'Thank God, that was empty,' he says, and stands. You reach for your wallet and he waves you off. 'Next time,' he says, 'It comes out in the wash.' He's gone and you know that you owe something now, to him and to here. (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt4))[ (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt4)) (set: $exploredSinceFrench to false) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE DEBT</div> <div class="haunt-description">You'll never not owe somebody a drink.</div> </div> (if: $haunts's length is 1)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we will call the marks 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them. <div class="notebook-hint">↗ Saved to your notebook</div> <div class="notebook-hint">Collect more haunts to unlock the map.</div> </div>]] (display: "French Rule SVG h24")</svg> [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <div class="items-tracker"> <strong>OBJECTS</strong> (if: $hasTrishaMatchbook is true)[<div class="item-entry">◈ Trisha's matchbook (an invitation)</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ A matchbook</div>] (if: $hasCleggBeermat is true)[<div class="item-entry">◈ A beer mat — Cecil Court / Carthage Short Hercules' Pillars</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ A beer mat</div>] (if: $hasMissingPage is true)[<div class="item-entry">◈ Page 47 (for O'Flatterly)</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ A missing page</div>] </div> (set: $alba to $alba + (a: $alba1)) (set: $albaGiven's red to true)\ (set: $albaRevealed to true) 'Forget the work,' says Red, 'it's no way to live. Try this.' As he turns from his ginger light he kisses you and, as he does, you close your eyes. Inside their shuttered lids you read: <div class="revelation-box alba-fade-first"> <em>"$alba1"</em> </div> <strong class="alba-counter alba-fade-first">THE FIRST LINE OF THREE</strong> [[Dream On|Alba Revealed]] <div class="quest-box"> <div class="quest-header">⟡ ALBA ⟡</div> <div class="quest-description"> There are three lines of an aubade out in Soho tonight. Find them before dawn and you'll get out alive. Miss them and you'll end up just another Dean Street dream. </div> <div class="quest-objective">TASK: FIND ALL THREE LINES BEFORE DAWN</div> </div> [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <div id="gs-approach"></div>[[·|LINE 2]] <svg class="green-sea-bar" viewBox="0 0 500 110" width="100%" height="110" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><radialGradient id="gs2Win1" cx="18%" cy="28%" opacity="0.05"/><path d="M55,110 L55,55 Q90,18 125,55 L125,110" fill="none" stroke="#8ad8e8" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M190,110 L190,40 Q250,0 310,40 L310,110" fill="#3a90a0" opacity="0.05"/><path d="M190,110 L190,40 Q250,0 310,40 L310,110" fill="none" stroke="#9ae0e8" stroke-width="1.1" opacity="0.20"/><path d="M375,110 L375,58 Q410,22 445,58 L445,110" fill="#3a8898" opacity="0.09"/><rect x="187" y="22" width="5" height="88" fill="#7ab8c8" opacity="0.07"/><rect x="308" y="22" width="5" height="88" fill="#7ab8c8" opacity="0.07"/><rect x="373" y="28" width="4" height="82" fill="#7ab8c8" opacity="0.09"/><line x1="40" y1="28" x2="460" y2="28" stroke="#4a7888" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.16"/><line x1="30" y1="20" x2="470" y2="20" stroke="#3a6878" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.09"/><g opacity="0.08" stroke="#a0e0d8" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"><path d="M60,11 Q80,7 100,11 Q120,15 140,11"/><path d="M65,17 Q85,13 105,17 Q125,21 145,17"/><path d="M350,9 Q370,5 390,9 Q410,13 430,9"/><path d="M355,16 Q375,12 395,16 Q415,20 435,16"/><path d="M200,7 Q218,3 236,7 Q254,11 272,7"/></g><g opacity="0.06" stroke="#88b898" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"><line x1="50" y1="96" x2="450" y2="96"/><line x1="40" y1="103" x2="460" y2="103"/><line x1="130" y1="91" x2="130" y2="110"/><line x1="200" y1="90" x2="200" y2="110"/><line x1="270" y1="90" x2="270" y2="110"/><line x1="340" y1="90" x2="340" y2="110"/><line x1="410" y1="91" x2="410" y2="110"/></g><circle cx="330" cy="110" r="55" fill="#c8a858" opacity="0.06"/><rect x="233" y="40" width="34" height="44" fill="none" stroke="#b8a870" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.14"/><rect x="236" y="43" width="28" height="38" fill="#a09060" opacity="0.03"/><g fill="#b8d8d0" opacity="0.16"><circle cx="72" cy="44" r="0.7"/><circle cx="140" cy="32" r="0.5"/><circle cx="175" cy="48" r="0.6"/><circle cx="248" cy="26" r="0.8"/><circle cx="295" cy="41" r="0.5"/><circle cx="368" cy="30" r="0.7"/><circle cx="432" cy="45" r="0.5"/></g><rect width="500" height="110" fill="url(#gs2FH)"/><rect width="500" height="110" fill="url(#gs2FV)"/></svg> Just off the beach is a bar called The Green Sea. It's mostly old men playing cribbage, and on its wall is a portrait of Ban Ali, though standards have slipped or morals have grown less important; there are women here now, white women, at least. At the back round the second biggest table is a family you know, playing cards with an Italian deck. Among them, with his back to you, is your old friend. The eldest of the kids. You see him before he sees you. (link: "Listen")[(set: $alba to $alba + (a: $alba2)) (set: $albaGiven's street2 to true) He speaks. The family roars on around, as his old sister winds a trick, him but you hear only this: <div class="revelation-box"> <em>"$alba2"</em> </div> <strong class="alba-counter">THE SECOND LINE OF THREE</strong> [[Then.|LINE 2 Oxford]]] (set: $sawMemory2 to true)\ <div class="lily-window"> <span class="lily-thought">North Quad, St. John's College, Oxford. Late May night and the sexy airs of summer, the trees' munificence. Her staircase and then her, footsteps away. And in the night-blown roses of your ears, repeating what you've learned for your exams:</span> <div class="quest-box"><em>Annihilating all that's made<br>To a green thought in a green shade.</em></div> </div> [[Return to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <svg class="green-sea-dawn" viewBox="0 0 500 100" width="100%" height="100" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="gs3Sky" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#060810" stop-opacity="1"/><stop offset="45%" stop-color="#0c1828" stop-opacity="1"/><stop offset="72%" stop-color="#1a2840" stop-opacity="1"/><stop offset="88%" stop-color="#2a3848" stop-opacity="1"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3a4858" stop-opacity="1"/></linearGradient><radialGradient id="gs3Glow" cx="50%" cy="90%" r="55%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#d8c0a8" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="#c09888" stop-opacity="0.28"/><stop offset="65%" stop-color="#a07878" stop-opacity="0.10"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#805868" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient><radialGradient id="gs3Pink" cx="28%" cy="84%" r="36%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e0a898" stop-opacity="0.38"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#c88898" stop-opacity="0.10"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#a06880" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient><radialGradient id="gs3Green" cx="72%" cy="80%" r="32%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#98d0a8" stop-opacity="0.33"/><stop offset="52%" stop-color="#68a888" stop-opacity="0.09"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3a7858" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient><linearGradient id="gs3Sea" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1a3048" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0e1e30" stop-opacity="0.65"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="gs3FH" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#060810" stop-opacity="1"/><stop offset="6%" stop-color="#060810" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="94%" stop-color="#060810" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#060810" stop-opacity="1"/></linearGradient></defs><rect width="500" height="100" fill="url(#gs3Sky)"/><rect width="500" height="100" fill="url(#gs3Glow)"/><rect width="500" height="100" fill="url(#gs3Pink)"/><rect width="500" height="100" fill="url(#gs3Green)"/><line x1="30" y1="74" x2="470" y2="74" stroke="#c8a890" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.28"/><rect y="74" width="500" height="26" fill="url(#gs3Sea)"/><g opacity="0.16" stroke="#d0b898" stroke-width="0.5" fill="none"><path d="M175,80 Q210,78 245,80 Q280,82 315,80"/><path d="M188,86 Q218,84 248,86 Q278,88 308,86"/><path d="M155,92 Q200,90 245,92 Q290,94 335,92"/></g><g opacity="0.09" stroke="#e0a898" stroke-width="0.4" fill="none"><path d="M90,84 Q125,82 160,84"/><path d="M335,82 Q368,80 400,82"/></g><g opacity="0.07" stroke="#98d0a8" stroke-width="0.4" fill="none"><path d="M305,89 Q338,87 370,89"/><path d="M108,92 Q140,90 172,92"/></g><path d="M195,52 L215,38 L245,43 L260,30 L276,44 L256,58 L233,52 Z" fill="#d8a898" opacity="0.08"/><path d="M199,50 L217,39 L243,43 L257,33 L271,45 L253,56 L231,50 Z" fill="none" stroke="#e0b8a8" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.17"/><path d="M90,46 L108,33 L126,38 L133,24 L150,36 L136,50 L111,46 Z" fill="#d0a8b0" opacity="0.07"/><path d="M93,45 L109,34 L124,38 L131,26 L146,37 L133,49 L113,45 Z" fill="none" stroke="#d8b8c0" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.14"/><path d="M345,50 L361,37 L381,41 L391,27 L409,39 L396,53 L371,49 Z" fill="#98c8a8" opacity="0.07"/><path d="M348,48 L363,38 L379,42 L389,30 L405,40 L394,51 L372,48 Z" fill="none" stroke="#a8d8b8" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.14"/><g opacity="0.06" stroke="#e8d0b8" stroke-width="0.4" fill="none"><line x1="250" y1="74" x2="192" y2="20"/><line x1="250" y1="74" x2="228" y2="14"/><line x1="250" y1="74" x2="268" y2="13"/><line x1="250" y1="74" x2="306" y2="22"/><line x1="250" y1="74" x2="155" y2="32"/><line x1="250" y1="74" x2="342" y2="28"/></g><g fill="#d0d8e8" opacity="0.22"><circle cx="48" cy="14" r="0.7"/><circle cx="118" cy="8" r="0.5"/><circle cx="88" cy="22" r="0.6"/><circle cx="168" cy="11" r="0.8"/><circle cx="148" cy="28" r="0.4"/><circle cx="222" cy="6" r="0.7"/><circle cx="298" cy="16" r="0.5"/><circle cx="348" cy="9" r="0.6"/><circle cx="390" cy="21" r="0.7"/><circle cx="428" cy="7" r="0.5"/><circle cx="458" cy="17" r="0.4"/><circle cx="72" cy="32" r="0.4"/></g><rect width="500" height="100" fill="url(#gs3FH)"/></svg> If dawn was something you could hear, you would hear it now. Your ears are attuned in a way that your eyes can never be. But you trust your eyes more, so the thrum of dawn approaching, registers as a silent alarm. Then you see it, the sky tearing patches from itself and bleeding red, orange, green through the night's bandage. (link: "Closer")[(set: $alba to $alba + (a: $alba3)) (set: $albaGiven's street3 to true) (set: $sawMemory3 to true) The last line comes out of your own throat, as you cry, 'I wish that I was never…' then: <div class="revelation-box"> <em>"$alba3"</em> </div> <div class="lily-window"> <span class="lily-thought">In a certain memory she sits on your bed, dressing; she is in her underwear, which is black and laced. It is not her beauty that stays with you or her nakedness; they struck you at the time but you've known many women after her. What changed you, under it all, was that vision of something you could not believe, made real; the perfect reality of love imagined, for the first time in your mind, as something close, that you could hold, kiss and make love to. It was the only time that life became quite real and you could not believe it. You'd burn Troy after Troy to see God's face like that again.</span> </div> It is written. You shall get out alive. <strong class="alba-counter">THE THIRD LINE — THE ALBA IS COMPLETE</strong> [[Soho!|Things turn up]]] (set: $awaitingLacklandPwd to false)\ Downstairs. A table tennis table, green as money. Two men: Percy Ritson, bookseller. Jack Curtis, poet. 20-20. Match point. [[Watch the decider|Watch the decider]] <div class="copper-door"> <!-- Maltese cross rule — dark iron tones --> <svg viewBox="0 0 300 40" width="100%" height="40" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="mgEdge" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="0" y1="36" x2="300" y2="36" stroke="url(#mgEdge)" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="0" y1="4" x2="300" y2="4" stroke="url(#mgEdge)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Maltese cross centre --><g transform="translate(150,20)" fill="none" stroke="#8b3030" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.55"><path d="M0,-10 L4,-4 L10,0 L4,4 L0,10 L-4,4 L-10,0 L-4,-4 Z"/><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="2.5" stroke-width="0.8"/></g><!-- Side studs --><circle cx="60" cy="20" r="1.8" fill="#4a1818" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="240" cy="20" r="1.8" fill="#4a1818" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="30" cy="20" r="1.2" fill="#4a1818" opacity="0.25"/><circle cx="270" cy="20" r="1.2" fill="#4a1818" opacity="0.25"/></svg> (set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 30)\ Salvu Copper, who is proportioned brutally, opens the door and leans over the threshold, like a hawk might hang over its prey. 'Can I help you?' said Salvu. <span class="guided-link">[['I'm a member.'|Approach Coppers Lair]]</span> [['Sorry, I think I've got the wrong door.'|Wrong door]] <svg viewBox="0 0 300 40" width="100%" height="40" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="mgEdge2" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6b2020" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><line x1="0" y1="4" x2="300" y2="4" stroke="url(#mgEdge2)" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="0" y1="36" x2="300" y2="36" stroke="url(#mgEdge2)" stroke-width="0.8"/><g transform="translate(150,20)" fill="none" stroke="#8b3030" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.55"><path d="M0,-10 L4,-4 L10,0 L4,4 L0,10 L-4,4 L-10,0 L-4,-4 Z"/><circle cx="0" cy="0" r="2.5" stroke-width="0.8"/></g></svg> </div> <div class="maritime-scene"> <div class="maritime-lamp"></div> <div class="maritime-lightning"></div> <span class="maritime-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 1200 18" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0,9 C25,2 50,16 75,9 C100,2 125,16 150,9 C175,2 200,16 225,9 C250,2 275,16 300,9 C325,2 350,16 375,9 C400,2 425,16 450,9 C475,2 500,16 525,9 C550,2 575,16 600,9 C625,2 650,16 675,9 C700,2 725,16 750,9 C775,2 800,16 825,9 C850,2 875,16 900,9 C925,2 950,16 975,9 C1000,2 1025,16 1050,9 C1075,2 1100,16 1125,9 C1150,2 1175,16 1200,9" fill="none" stroke="#4a7090" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.8"/></svg></span> Turning onto Greek Street, you find yourself at sea and in a storm. <span class="maritime-svg-wrap slow"><svg viewBox="0 0 1200 18" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0,12 C30,4 60,16 90,12 C120,4 150,16 180,12 C210,4 240,16 270,12 C300,4 330,16 360,12 C390,4 420,16 450,12 C480,4 510,16 540,12 C570,4 600,16 630,12 C660,4 690,16 720,12 C750,4 780,16 810,12 C840,4 870,16 900,12 C930,4 960,16 990,12 C1020,4 1050,16 1080,12 C1110,4 1140,16 1170,12 C1200,4 1200,16 1200,12" fill="none" stroke="#3a5a78" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.9"/></svg></span> The broiling waters shred your ship till it's leaf-tobacco, toss it like a stub. <span class="maritime-svg-wrap"><svg viewBox="0 0 1200 18" preserveAspectRatio="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M0,9 C25,2 50,16 75,9 C100,2 125,16 150,9 C175,2 200,16 225,9 C250,2 275,16 300,9 C325,2 350,16 375,9 C400,2 425,16 450,9 C475,2 500,16 525,9 C550,2 575,16 600,9 C625,2 650,16 675,9 C700,2 725,16 750,9 C775,2 800,16 825,9 C850,2 875,16 900,9 C925,2 950,16 975,9 C1000,2 1025,16 1050,9 C1075,2 1100,16 1125,9 C1150,2 1175,16 1200,9" fill="none" stroke="#4a7090" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.8"/></svg></span> A big hand splits the sky and a big voice booms: <span class="ne-plus-ultra">NE. PLUS. ULTRA.</span> Do you keep going? [[Yes|Approach The Pillars]] (if: $hasCleggBeermat is true)[[[Seek the shore|The coast of Carthage]]](else:)[//There is no present horizon.//] </div> (set: $exploredSinceFrench to true)\ <div class="venue-back-btn">(link: "← Dean Street")[(go-to: "Dean Street")]</div> You find the building on Frith Street, on the door: M. Lackland. You knock and he buzzes you in. You climb two doglegs to his rooms. He lifts the needle from his record, sinks his glass then tops it up again (more scotch and soda). (link: "⟡ What's he listening to? ⟡")[<div class="lore-box"> On the turntable was //2 + 2 + 1 = Ponderosa Twins Plus One//, by the Ponderosa Twins Plus One, more specifically the song 'Bound', on which the producer Bobby Massey has writing credit. Massey had been with the O'Jays and would go on, after the turning of the millennium, to be listed as executive producer on a film with the Spice Girls and two films with David Beckham. But he, like the rest of that group, was from Cleveland, Ohio, in the U.S.A. I'm writing this in February, 2026; if you're reading it you'll have lived at least a touch longer. So we'll know that Ye sample that song in 'Bound 2', when he still went by Kanye West. But Lackland knows nothing about that. He has a Garrard 401 screwed into the wall, with an SME arm bolted on and a Shure cartridge. This means that he can play his music loudly. He found the album at Dobell's several lunches ago, and it's hardly been silent since. </div>] He turns to his desk with both his elbows and setting them down individually, says, 'You were sent here by Jeffrey?' You nod. 'Well, give it here.' You lay //(print: $bookTitle)// down. He reads the first page; then the last; then a page from somewhere in the middle. (if: $confidence >= 60)[He sets it down as one might set a toddler down on the floor. 'This isn't bad. Have you got a job? A wife? How long can you give to me? You've something but there's work to do; lots of work.' This is as close as you've come to anything. (set: $confidence to $confidence + 22) [[Leave|Dean Street]]] (else:)[He sets it down. 'This isn't there.' You knew that. (set: $confidence to $confidence - 9) [[Leave|Dean Street]]] (if: $knowsCopperSecret is true)[You notice a door at the back of the office you hadn't seen before. Or perhaps you had, but now it means something. <div id="lackland-pwd-wrap" style="text-align:center;margin-top:1.2em;"> <input type="text" id="lackland-pwd-input" placeholder="Whisper the word…" style="background:#0d0806;color:#d4a574;border:1px solid #8a4a3a;padding:6px 14px;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:1em;width:220px;outline:none;" /> <button id="lackland-pwd-btn" style="background:#1a0a08;color:#d4a574;border:1px solid #8a4a3a;padding:6px 18px;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:1em;cursor:pointer;margin-left:6px;">Whisper it</button> <p id="lackland-pwd-hint" style="font-size:0.78em;color:#7a6a5a;margin-top:0.6em;letter-spacing:0.05em;">If you can't remember the password, check your notebook.</p> </div> <span id="go-lackland-yes" style="display:none">[[·|Lackland's Back Room]]</span>] (set: $knowsLackland to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 6)\ You're back on Dean Street. From the direction of Leicester Square a man is approaching. He is walking a cow. He is Jeffrey Bernard. He stops, and resumes a conversation you'd never begun: 'I'd very much like to wake up one morning with a cow of the Friesian variety and walk her down to Soho to the Coach and Horses, stopping on the way to buy twenty Players, ply her with vodkas until closing time, whip her off to an Indian restaurant, take her up to the Colony Room till 5.30 and then to the Yorkminster, Swiss Tavern, Three Greyhounds, get beaten up by Chinese waiters at midnight, have a row with the taxi driver, set the bed on fire, put it out with tears and then wake up on the floor. Could you then milk said cow? I doubt it.' The cow regards you with milky indifference. 'Will you do something about this cow?' Said Jeffrey Bernard. You take its bridle. It sneezes. When you look back he's disappeared to a timeshare on the seacoast of Bohemia. (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt3))[ (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt3)) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE BEAST</div> <div class="haunt-description">Is it New York or New Year?</div> </div> (if: $haunts's length is 1)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we will call the marks 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them. <div class="notebook-hint">↗ Saved to your notebook</div> <div class="notebook-hint">Collect more haunts to unlock the map.</div> </div>]] [[Ride the beast|Ride Jeffrey Bernard's cow]] You lie on the Dean Street pavement like a mechanic under a chassis, take an udder in your fist and squeeze it, gingerly. A little warm milk plashes on your lips. It tastes of grass and moonlight and something you can't name. 'This,' you think, 'is why he is unwell.' (set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 22) (set: $confidence to $confidence + 15) [[Get up and try again|Dean Street]] Centre Point is still behind you. It's been there all night long. The way that you conceive, now, of its height is more temporal than spatial and like time but not but like space it remains impossible, merely notional; has a quality that space only attains when we imagine it infinitely. One jumping from the top should fall forever and seem to fall as a ton of feathers falls in a perfect vacuum. Standing here you can see London, Carthage, Liverpool and everything else. (if: $hadPhoneCall is true)[You think of Aoife. The baby. The cold flat waiting for you with nothing in it but your failure.] [[Lose|Black page]] <div class="pillars-scene"> <div class="pillars-light"></div> <div class="pillars-smoke"></div> <div class="pillars-dust"><span style="left:12%;bottom:18%;animation-duration:7s;animation-delay:0s;"></span><span style="left:32%;bottom:8%;animation-duration:9.5s;animation-delay:1.2s;"></span><span style="left:52%;bottom:28%;animation-duration:6.5s;animation-delay:2.8s;"></span><span style="left:72%;bottom:5%;animation-duration:11s;animation-delay:0.4s;"></span><span style="left:22%;bottom:38%;animation-duration:8.5s;animation-delay:1.8s;"></span><span style="left:82%;bottom:22%;animation-duration:10s;animation-delay:3.5s;"></span><span style="left:42%;bottom:12%;animation-duration:7.8s;animation-delay:0.8s;"></span><span style="left:62%;bottom:32%;animation-duration:9s;animation-delay:2.2s;"></span></div> <svg class="pillars-lattice" viewBox="0 0 300 36" width="100%" height="36" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="latEdge" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><pattern id="dLat" x="0" y="0" width="42" height="24" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><path d="M7,0 L14,12 L7,24 L0,12 Z" fill="rgba(160,35,25,0.26)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M21,0 L28,12 L21,24 L14,12 Z" fill="rgba(185,215,235,0.07)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M35,0 L42,12 L35,24 L28,12 Z" fill="rgba(28,108,52,0.22)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/></pattern><mask id="latMask"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" fill="url(#latEdge)"/></mask></defs><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" fill="url(#dLat)" mask="url(#latMask)"/><line x1="0" y1="34" x2="300" y2="34" stroke="url(#latEdge)" stroke-width="1.2"/></svg> 'None of us likes it.' <span class="guided-link">(link-goto: "Put //" + $bookTitle + "// on the table", "The critic's judgement")</span> </div> <svg class="cecil-rule" viewBox="0 0 400 50" width="100%" height="50" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="ccFade" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8a6a30" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="10%" opacity="0.25"/><path d="M238,18 Q242,21 238,24 Q244,21 238,18Z" fill="#c8a050" fill-opacity="0.2" stroke="#c8a050" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.3"/><text x="258" y="42" font-size="7" fill="#c8a050" opacity="0.25" font-family="serif">𓂀</text><circle cx="360" cy="15" r="1" fill="#c8a050" opacity="0.2"/></svg> Inis O'Flatterly clocks you, first with his eyes still downcast, then eventually as he looks up. 'You're a novelist and that wasn't a question,' he steams; it is the gentle steaming of the kettle, not that of the railway. (if: $hasMissingPage is true)[Your hand goes to your pocket. The page. You'd almost forgotten; the night has that effect. [[Show him the page|Return the page]]]\ (else:)[[[What book?|O'Flatterly's quest]]] 'Dear boy,' he burrs, 'I don't know who you are, and don't care who you are, and I don't know that I don't like what you've written; but do me a kindness, kid, and let's just assume I won't love it. Besides, there is something more important that you must do for me; that we must do together.' O'Flatterly coughs, disturbing the dust on the tome before him, agitating its thousand motes into flight, which hang over his desk like slate-grey clouds over Willesden Junction. His hair, which was blond already, seems longer and wilder now. He slaps the manuscript like an arse and says: 'Something's missing! Page 47. It fell from my arms, yesterday night in the dusk, somewhere in Soho. I can tell that you move among monsters and thieves, one of them must have it: get it for me, please.' (set: $knowsAboutPage to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ QUEST ⟡</strong> Inis O'Flatterly is searching for a missing page — Page 47 of an impossible manuscript. It's somewhere in Soho. Find it and return it to him.(if: $hasCleggBeermat is true)[ The beer mat points the way: //Carthage//.] </div> (if: $hasCleggBeermat is true)[Your hand goes to your pocket. The beer mat. Ritson's scrawl on the back: //Carthage Short Hercules' Pillars.// [[I know where to look|Dean Street]]](else:)[[[I'll look for it|Dean Street]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety < 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: $opponent is "Jack Curtis")[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 2]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety < 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: $opponent is "Jack Curtis")[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 3]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety < 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: $opponent is "Jack Curtis")[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Next point|PP Point 4]]]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety < 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: $opponent is "Jack Curtis")[(if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (else:)[(if: _roll >= 7)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1)] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1)]] (if: $ppScore >= 3)[[[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(if: $oppScore >= 3)[[[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] (else:)[[[Final point|PP Point 5]]]] (set: $confidence to $confidence - 9)\ <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-lose">DEFEAT</span></div> </div> (if: $opponent is "Jack Curtis")[(set: $hasTrishaMatchbook to true) Curtis tosses you a matchbook. 'Trisha's. Tell them Jack Curtis sent you.' <div class="item-box"> <div class="item-header">◈ OBJECT ACQUIRED</div> <div class="item-name">Trisha's Matchbook</div> </div>] (set: $knowsCecilCourt to true)(set: $hasCleggBeermat to true) Percy Ritson scrawls something on a beer mat and slides it in your pocket. <div class="item-box"> <div class="item-header">◈ OBJECT ACQUIRED</div> <div class="item-name">A Beer Mat</div> </div> 'There's a bookseller in Cecil Court. Tell him I sent you.' You flip it over. On the other side, is written: //Carthage Short Hercules' Pillars.// (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt5))[ (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt5)) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE GAME</div> <div class="haunt-description">No fair tennis without a net.</div> </div> (if: $haunts's length is 1)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we will call the marks 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them. <div class="notebook-hint">↗ Saved to your notebook</div> <div class="notebook-hint">Collect more haunts to unlock the map.</div> </div>]] [[Back upstairs|Dean Street]] [[Head for The Pillars of Hercules|Approach The Pillars]] [[Head for Cecil Court|Cecil Court]] (set: _roll to (random: 1, 10)) (if: $sobriety >= 40)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: $confidence >= 50)[(set: _roll to _roll + 1)] (if: _roll >= 6)[(set: $ppScore to $ppScore + 1) It could go either way and it goes yours. [[Victory|PP Victory]]] (else:)[(set: $oppScore to $oppScore + 1) It could go either way. It goes against you. [[Defeat|PP Defeat]]] <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-ball">●</span> YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent <span class="pp-ball">●</span></div> How do you play this point? [[Steady and safe — keep it in play|PP Steady 1]] [[Aggressive — go for the winner|PP Aggressive 1]] [[Trick shot — do something unexpected|PP Trick 1]] </div> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-ball">●</span> YOU $ppScore — $oppScore $opponent <span class="pp-ball">●</span></div> How do you play this point? You got something wrong. The set plays without you.
