stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="rnGd" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="75%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><!-- Warm stage-light bleed above the main rule --><radialGradient id="rnSpill" cx="50%" cy="100%" r="60%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e8c060" stop-opacity="0.18"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e8c060" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><!-- Stage-light spill glow above the rule --><rect x="30" y="0" width="240" height="22" fill="url(#rnSpill)"/><!-- Fine upper shadow line --><line x1="0" y1="18" x2="300" y2="18" stroke="url(#rnGd)" stroke-width="0.7"/><!-- Main bright rule --><line x1="0" y1="22" x2="300" y2="22" stroke="url(#rnG)" stroke-width="2.2"/><!-- Subtle secondary line beneath --><line x1="0" y1="25" x2="300" y2="25" stroke="url(#rnGd)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Small diamond at centre — like a stage footlight marker --><polygon points="150,19 153,22 150,25 147,22" fill="#aac8f0" opacity="0.7"/><!-- Two flanking dots --><circle cx="100" cy="22" r="1.2" fill="#8aacdc" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="200" cy="22" r="1.2" fill="#8aacdc" opacity="0.5"/></svg> <div class="pp-arena"> <div class="pp-score"><span class="pp-result-win">★ SIGNED, SEALED, DELIVERED ★</span></div> </div> //&#91;PLACEHOLDER: Win prose \u2014 drinks delivered successfully&#93;// (set: $completedSetlist to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 18) [[Listen|The Set]] (display: "Ronnies Rule SVG h14") </div> <div class="ronnies-scene"> <div class="ronnies-spot"></div> <div class="ronnies-cone"></div> (display: "Ronnies Rule SVG h14") From jazz you can learn more about prose than you can about poetry. The last note hangs itself from the rafters. The room's dead still. Moe nods. 'Go sell a book,' he says. (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt7))[ (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt7)) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE HEAD</div> <div class="haunt-description">GOD.IS.LOVE</div> </div> (if: $haunts's length is 1)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we will call the marks 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them. <div class="notebook-hint">↗ Saved to your notebook</div> <div class="notebook-hint">Collect more haunts to unlock the map.</div> </div>]] <span class="guided-link">[[The Pillars is round the corner on Greek Street.|Maritime interlude]]</span> [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <div class="ronnies-scene"> <div class="ronnies-spot"></div> <div class="ronnies-cone"></div> <svg class="ronnies-rule" viewBox="0 0 300 20" width="100%" height="20" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="rnG" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6888b8" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="22%" stop-color="#8aacdc" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#aac8f0" stop-opacity="0.90"/><stop offset="78%" stop-color="#8aacdc" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#6888b8" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="rnGd" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="75%" stop-color="#6070a0" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#405880" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><!-- Warm stage-light bleed above the main rule --><radialGradient id="rnSpill" cx="50%" cy="100%" r="60%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#e8c060" stop-opacity="0.18"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e8c060" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><!-- Stage-light spill glow above the rule --><rect x="30" y="0" width="240" height="22" fill="url(#rnSpill)"/><!-- Fine upper shadow line --><line x1="0" y1="18" x2="300" y2="18" stroke="url(#rnGd)" stroke-width="0.7"/><!-- Main bright rule --><line x1="0" y1="22" x2="300" y2="22" stroke="url(#rnG)" stroke-width="2.2"/><!-- Subtle secondary line beneath --><line x1="0" y1="25" x2="300" y2="25" stroke="url(#rnGd)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Small diamond at centre — like a stage footlight marker --><polygon points="150,19 153,22 150,25 147,22" fill="#aac8f0" opacity="0.7"/><!-- Two flanking dots --><circle cx="100" cy="22" r="1.2" fill="#8aacdc" opacity="0.5"/><circle cx="200" cy="22" r="1.2" fill="#8aacdc" opacity="0.5"/></svg> (set: $confidence to $confidence - 9) 'Bottled,' says Moe. 'I can always tell.' [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] (display: "Ronnies Rule SVG h14") </div> You pause, for a whole long minute, and think of yourself, so as to become, Trelawny, salvaging what he thought was Shelley's heart from the flaming corpse, and punch a fist into the flames to rescue the paper. (set: $hasMissingPage to true) <div class="page-found"><svg class="page-emerge" viewBox="0 0 80 110" aria-hidden="true"><defs><radialGradient id="p47Glow" cx="50%" cy="100%" r="80%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffc068" stop-opacity="0.75"/><stop offset="40%" stop-color="#d4600a" stop-opacity="0.35"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0a0a12" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient><linearGradient id="p47Paper" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f2e4c6"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c8b090"/></linearGradient></defs><ellipse cx="40" cy="102" rx="44" ry="16" fill="url(#p47Glow)"/><path d="M18,8 Q14,6 13,14 L10,92 Q12,100 22,98 L60,96 Q70,94 68,86 L65,16 Q62,8 56,10 Z" fill="url(#p47Paper)" stroke="#a08860" stroke-width="0.8"/><path d="M56,10 Q62,12 60,20 Q54,18 56,10 Z" fill="#d8c098" stroke="#a08860" stroke-width="0.6"/><text x="40" y="22" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Georgia, serif" font-size="7" fill="#4a3828" opacity="0.85" font-style="italic">47</text><line x1="22" y1="30" x2="58" y2="31" stroke="#6a5040" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.6"/><line x1="22" y1="37" x2="60" y2="38" stroke="#6a5040" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.55"/><line x1="22" y1="44" x2="55" y2="45" stroke="#6a5040" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.5"/><line x1="22" y1="51" x2="60" y2="52" stroke="#6a5040" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.55"/><line x1="22" y1="58" x2="48" y2="59" stroke="#6a5040" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.5"/><line x1="22" y1="65" x2="58" y2="66" stroke="#6a5040" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.5"/><line x1="22" y1="72" x2="55" y2="73" stroke="#6a5040" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.45"/><line x1="22" y1="79" x2="50" y2="80" stroke="#6a5040" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M10,92 Q22,97 40,97 Q58,97 68,93 L68,86 Q55,94 32,93 L12,90 Z" fill="#3a2010" opacity="0.38"/><path d="M14,90 Q18,94 16,98 Q12,96 14,90 Z" fill="#5a2808" opacity="0.55"/><path d="M62,88 Q66,92 64,96 Q60,94 62,88 Z" fill="#5a2808" opacity="0.5"/></svg> <div class="page-found-header">⟡ PAGE 47 ⟡</div> <div class="page-found-body">You have Page 47. Return it to Inis O'Flatterly in Cecil Court.</div> </div> [[Return to Inis O'Flatterly|Return the page]] You show him the lost page. O'Flatterly's hands snatch it from your hand like a mother might take hold of a missing child. He stares a while, then lays it into his papers, where it should be. Then he looks at you as he would if he shelved you among his beloved books. [['You don't know the good that you've done'|O'Flatterly's Gift]] <div class="glass-pane">'If I may, let me give you small thanks.' From beneath the counter he produces a small glass vial. It contains a slice of something resembling jerky. 'This,' he says, 'is a slice of the liver of Percy Bysshe Shelley. It was cut from his body, as it burned on the beach at Viareggio, by Trelawny, who mistook his liver for his heart. Swallow it if you ever get close to the end.' </div> (set: $returnedPage to true)\ (set: $hasLiver to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 22) <div class="item-box"> <div class="item-header">◈ OBJECT ACQUIRED</div> <div class="item-name">Shelley's Liver</div> </div> (if: not ($haunts contains $haunt6))[ (set: $haunts to $haunts + (a: $haunt6)) <div class="haunt-box"> <div class="haunt-header">⟡ HAUNT COLLECTED ⟡</div> <div class="haunt-name">THE DELIVERY</div> <div class="haunt-description">Shelley Never Dies.</div> </div> (if: $haunts's length is 1)[(set: $hauntExplained to true) <div class="lore-box"> <strong>⟡ HAUNTS ⟡</strong> Tonight, Soho will mark you. Here, in our mutual dream, we will call the marks 'haunts'. You'll gather them as you wander the night and its stages. Seek them. <div class="notebook-hint">↗ Saved to your notebook</div> <div class="notebook-hint">Collect more haunts to unlock the map.</div> </div>]] [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] You cry, 'Soho! Soho!' and mount the beast. <span id="cow-data-won" style="display:none;">(print: $cowRideWon)</span> <div id="cow-game-wrap" style="margin:1em 0;"> <canvas id="cow-canvas" width="380" height="520" style="display:block;max-width:100%;border:1px solid rgba(80,60,10,0.25);cursor:pointer;"></canvas> <div id="cow-instructions" style="text-align:center;color:#7a5a18;font-size:0.75em;letter-spacing:0.12em;margin-top:0.4em;">&#8592;&#8594; arrow keys &nbsp;&#183;&nbsp; or click LEFT / MID / RIGHT lane</div> </div> <span id="cow-go-win" style="display:none;">[[Onward|Cow ride success]]</span> <span id="cow-go-lose" style="display:none;">[[Thrown|Cow ride fail]]</span> <script> (function(){ /* ── Skip if already won ── */ var wonSpan = document.getElementById('cow-data-won'); var cowWon = wonSpan ? wonSpan.textContent.trim() : ''; if (cowWon === 'true') { var wrap = document.getElementById('cow-game-wrap'); if (wrap) wrap.style.display = 'none'; setTimeout(function(){ var sp = document.getElementById('cow-go-win'); if (sp) { var lk = sp.querySelector('tw-link'); if (lk) lk.click(); } }, 500); return; } var W = 380, H = 520; var canvas = document.getElementById('cow-canvas'); if (!canvas) return; var ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); /* ── Layout: 3 vertical lanes, player at bottom ── */ var LANE_COUNT = 3; var LANE_W = W / LANE_COUNT; /* ~127px each */ var LANE_X = [LANE_W*0.5, LANE_W*1.5, LANE_W*2.5]; /* lane centres */ var PLAYER_Y = H - 80; /* near bottom */ /* ── Timing ── */ var PRACTICE_TIME = 12000; /* 12s practice */ var REAL_TIME = 40000; /* 40s real game */ var phase = 'title'; /* 'title' | 'practice' | 'countdown' | 'real' | 'over' */ var phaseStart = Date.now(); var countdownAt = 0; var gameOver = false; var wonGame = false; var gameEnded = false; var lives = 3; var hitFlashAt = 0; /* timestamp of last hit (for invincibility flash) */ var INVULN_TIME = 1200; /* 1.2s invulnerability after a hit */ var playerLane = 1; var playerX = LANE_X[1]; var targetX = LANE_X[1]; var lastKeyAt = 0; var obstacles = []; var spawnCD = 60; var baseSpeed = 2.8; /* ── Scrolling road offset (for texture animation) ── */ var roadScroll = 0; /* ── Lane highlight / click feedback ── */ var hoverLane = -1; /* which lane the mouse is over (-1 = none) */ var clickFlash = -1; /* lane that was just clicked */ var clickFlashAt = 0; /* timestamp of click flash */ /* ── Obstacle types ── */ var TYPES = [ { name:'REVELLER', w:30, h:44, weight:32, spd:1.00, wide:false }, { name:'WAITER', w:24, h:48, weight:18, spd:1.40, wide:false }, { name:'PIG', w:36, h:40, weight:18, spd:0.85, wide:false }, { name:'BARREL', w:30, h:30, weight:14, spd:1.70, wide:false }, { name:'BLACK CAB', w:LANE_W*1.9, h:72, weight:22, spd:1.10, wide:true }, { name:'UBER', w:LANE_W*1.7, h:66, weight:10, spd:1.35, wide:true } ]; function pickType(){ var tot=0; for(var i=0;i<TYPES.length;i++) tot+=TYPES[i].weight; var r=Math.random()*tot; for(var j=0;j<TYPES.length;j++){ r-=TYPES[j].weight; if(r<=0) return TYPES[j]; } return TYPES[0]; } function spawnObstacle(){ var t=pickType(); /* ── Fairness: check which lanes are blocked near the top ── */ /* Narrow danger zone so it doesn't over-restrict spawns */ var blocked=[false,false,false]; var wideInZone=false; for(var bi=0;bi<obstacles.length;bi++){ var ob=obstacles[bi]; if(ob.y < 90){ if(ob.type.wide){ wideInZone=true; blocked[ob.lane]=true; if(ob.lane+1<LANE_COUNT) blocked[ob.lane+1]=true; } else { blocked[ob.lane]=true; } } } var freeCount=0; for(var fc=0;fc<LANE_COUNT;fc++) if(!blocked[fc]) freeCount++; /* Skip spawn if it would leave no free lane */ if(!t.wide && freeCount<=1){ return; /* don't block the last free lane */ } if(t.wide && (freeCount<3 || wideInZone)){ /* wide vehicles need all lanes clear and no other wide vehicle nearby */ return; } var lane=Math.floor(Math.random()*LANE_COUNT); var x; if(t.wide){ lane=Math.floor(Math.random()*(LANE_COUNT-1)); x=(LANE_X[lane]+LANE_X[lane+1])/2; } else { /* prefer spawning in a non-blocked lane if possible */ if(blocked[lane] && freeCount>1){ var tries=0; while(blocked[lane] && tries<10){ lane=Math.floor(Math.random()*LANE_COUNT); tries++; } } x=LANE_X[lane]; } var drift=0; /* lateral drift speed – increases in later tiers */ var tier=getTier(); if(tier>=4 && !t.wide){ drift=(Math.random()-0.5) * (tier-3) * 0.4; } obstacles.push({ type:t, x:x, y:-60, lane:lane, wobble:Math.random()*6.28, drift:drift }); } var lastSpeedTier = -1; function getSpeed(){ var elapsed; if(phase==='practice') elapsed=Date.now()-phaseStart; else if(phase==='real') elapsed=Date.now()-phaseStart; else elapsed=0; if(phase==='practice') return 1.2; /* gentle practice speed */ /* 8 tiers across 40s (5s each): very gradual start, frantic finish */ var tier = Math.min(7, Math.floor(elapsed / 5000)); var speeds = [1.3, 1.7, 2.2, 2.9, 3.8, 5.0, 6.5, 8.5]; var tElapsed = elapsed - tier * 5000; var cur = speeds[tier]; var nxt = tier < 7 ? speeds[tier + 1] : cur + 2.0; var sp = cur + (nxt - cur) * (tElapsed / 5000) * 0.4; return sp; } function getTier(){ if(phase!=='real') return 0; var elapsed=Date.now()-phaseStart; return Math.min(7, Math.floor(elapsed/5000)); } /* ── Start real game ── */ function startReal(){ phase='real'; phaseStart=Date.now(); obstacles=[]; spawnCD=50; playerLane=1; targetX=LANE_X[1]; playerX=LANE_X[1]; } /* ── Update ── */ function update(){ if(gameOver) return; if(phase==='title') return; var spd=getSpeed(); roadScroll+=spd*1.5; /* smooth player movement */ playerX += (targetX - playerX) * 0.18; /* practice → countdown → real transition */ if(phase==='practice' && Date.now()-phaseStart >= PRACTICE_TIME){ phase='countdown'; countdownAt=Date.now(); obstacles=[]; } if(phase==='countdown' && Date.now()-countdownAt >= 2200){ startReal(); } if(phase==='countdown') return; /* freeze during countdown */ /* spawn */ spawnCD--; if(spawnCD<=0){ spawnObstacle(); var el2=Date.now()-phaseStart; var iv; if(phase==='practice') iv=75; else iv=Math.max(20, 80 - el2/800); /* starts spacious, ramps over 40s, stays fair */ spawnCD=iv*(0.7+Math.random()*0.5); } /* move obstacles downward + lateral drift */ for(var i=obstacles.length-1;i>=0;i--){ obstacles[i].y += spd * obstacles[i].type.spd; obstacles[i].wobble += 0.06; /* lateral swerve in later tiers */ if(obstacles[i].drift){ obstacles[i].x += obstacles[i].drift; /* bounce off pavement edges */ if(obstacles[i].x < 30) obstacles[i].drift = Math.abs(obstacles[i].drift); if(obstacles[i].x > W-30) obstacles[i].drift = -Math.abs(obstacles[i].drift); } if(obstacles[i].y > H+80) obstacles.splice(i,1); } /* collision (only in real game) */ if(phase==='real'){ var now=Date.now(); var invulnerable=(now-hitFlashAt < INVULN_TIME); var px=playerX, py=PLAYER_Y, pw=40, ph=42; if(!invulnerable){ for(var j=0;j<obstacles.length;j++){ var o=obstacles[j]; var ow=o.type.w*0.60, oh=o.type.h*0.60; if(Math.abs(px-o.x)<(pw+ow)/2 && Math.abs(py-o.y)<(ph+oh)/2){ lives--; hitFlashAt=now; /* remove the obstacle we hit */ obstacles.splice(j,1); if(lives<=0){ gameOver=true; wonGame=false; /* navigate to fail passage */ setTimeout(function(){ navigate(); },1200); return; } break; /* only one hit per frame */ } } } /* win check */ if(now-phaseStart >= REAL_TIME){ gameOver=true; wonGame=true; /* navigate to win passage */ setTimeout(function(){ navigate(); },1800); } } } /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════ DRAWING ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */ /* ── Fixed street furniture positions (seeded so they don't change frame to frame) ── */ var LAMPS = [ {side:'L', baseY:60}, {side:'R', baseY:200}, {side:'L', baseY:340}, {side:'R', baseY:480}, {side:'L', baseY:620} ]; var SHOPFRONTS = [ {side:'L', baseY:0, colour:'#3a1a2a', name:'THE FRENCH', neon:'#e84060'}, {side:'R', baseY:130, colour:'#1a2a3a', name:'BAR ITALIA', neon:'#40c0e8'}, {side:'L', baseY:260, colour:'#2a2a18', name:'RONNIE\u2019S', neon:'#e8c040'}, {side:'R', baseY:390, colour:'#2a1a28', name:'REVUE BAR', neon:'#e840a0'}, {side:'L', baseY:520, colour:'#1a2828', name:'TRATTORIA', neon:'#40e880'} ]; var DRAINS = [70, 190, 310, 430, 550]; function drawStreet(){ /* base dark road */ ctx.fillStyle='#08080e'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H); /* wider pavements with subtle texture */ ctx.fillStyle='#12121a'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,22,H); ctx.fillRect(W-22,0,22,H); /* paving slab lines (scrolling) */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(30,28,20,0.5)'; ctx.lineWidth=1; var slabOff=roadScroll*0.8%36; for(var sy=-36+slabOff;sy<H+36;sy+=36){ ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,sy); ctx.lineTo(22,sy); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(W-22,sy); ctx.lineTo(W,sy); ctx.stroke(); } /* kerb lines – double line for depth */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(70,60,30,0.6)'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(22,0); ctx.lineTo(22,H); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(W-22,0); ctx.lineTo(W-22,H); ctx.stroke(); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(40,35,15,0.4)'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(23,0); ctx.lineTo(23,H); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(W-23,0); ctx.lineTo(W-23,H); ctx.stroke(); /* ── Shop fronts on pavements (scrolling colour blocks with names) ── */ var shopScroll=roadScroll*0.8; SHOPFRONTS.forEach(function(sh){ var sy2=(sh.baseY + shopScroll) % (H+200) - 100; var sx = sh.side==='L' ? 0 : W-22; var sw = 22; /* coloured awning/frontage */ ctx.fillStyle=sh.colour; ctx.fillRect(sx, sy2, sw, 80); /* door frame */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.4)'; ctx.fillRect(sx+(sh.side==='L'?8:4), sy2+35, 10, 45); /* neon sign glow */ var ngx = sh.side==='L' ? 11 : W-11; ctx.save(); ctx.globalAlpha=0.3; ctx.fillStyle=sh.neon; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(ngx,sy2+20,9,12,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.globalAlpha=0.15; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(ngx,sy2+20,16,20,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.globalAlpha=1.0; ctx.restore(); }); /* cobblestone grid – scrolling */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(22,22,38,0.7)'; ctx.lineWidth=1; var off=roadScroll%28; for(var y=-28+off; y<H+28; y+=28){ ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(22,y); ctx.lineTo(W-22,y); ctx.stroke(); } /* offset vertical cobble lines for staggered brickwork effect */ var offH=roadScroll*0.3%28; for(var row=-1; row<(H/28)+2; row++){ var ry=row*28+off; var stagger=(row%2)*14; for(var x=22+stagger; x<W-22; x+=28){ ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(x,ry); ctx.lineTo(x,ry+28); ctx.stroke(); } } /* ── Drain covers (scrolling circular grates) ── */ var drainScroll=roadScroll*1.1; DRAINS.forEach(function(dy){ var dy2=(dy+drainScroll)%(H+160)-80; /* manhole in road */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(8,8,16,0.6)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(W/2,dy2,14,10,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* grate lines */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(40,40,50,0.7)'; ctx.lineWidth=1.5; for(var gi=-2;gi<=2;gi++){ ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(W/2-10,dy2+gi*4); ctx.lineTo(W/2+10,dy2+gi*4); ctx.stroke(); } ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(50,45,30,0.5)'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(W/2,dy2,14,10,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke(); }); /* lane divider dashes */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(70,55,15,0.35)'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.setLineDash([10,14]); var dashOff=roadScroll%24; for(var l=1;l<LANE_COUNT;l++){ ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(LANE_W*l, -24+dashOff); ctx.lineTo(LANE_W*l, H); ctx.stroke(); } ctx.setLineDash([]); /* gutter puddles – reflect neon colours */ var pudOff=roadScroll*0.8%400; var pudCols=['rgba(60,20,40,0.25)','rgba(20,40,60,0.25)','rgba(50,40,10,0.25)']; [80,230,370].forEach(function(py,pi){ var py2=(py+pudOff)%(H+120)-60; ctx.fillStyle=pudCols[pi%3]; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(32,py2,14,6,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(W-32,py2+55,12,5,0.3,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); }); /* ── Lamp posts (scrolling, with warm glow cones) ── */ var lampScroll=roadScroll*0.8; LAMPS.forEach(function(lp){ var ly2=(lp.baseY + lampScroll) % (H+200) - 100; var lx = lp.side==='L' ? 10 : W-10; /* post – thin dark iron */ ctx.strokeStyle='#2a2820'; ctx.lineWidth=3; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(lx,ly2+40); ctx.lineTo(lx,ly2-10); ctx.stroke(); /* ornamental bracket */ var armDir = lp.side==='L' ? 1 : -1; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(lx,ly2-8); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(lx+armDir*8,ly2-16,lx+armDir*12,ly2-12); ctx.stroke(); /* lantern box */ ctx.fillStyle='#3a3420'; ctx.fillRect(lx+armDir*9-3, ly2-16, 6, 8); /* warm glass */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(220,180,60,0.7)'; ctx.fillRect(lx+armDir*9-2, ly2-15, 4, 6); /* glow cone onto road */ var glow=ctx.createRadialGradient(lx+armDir*10,ly2-8,3,lx+armDir*10,ly2+30,60); glow.addColorStop(0,'rgba(200,160,50,0.12)'); glow.addColorStop(1,'rgba(200,160,50,0)'); ctx.fillStyle=glow; ctx.fillRect(lx-50,ly2-40,100,120); }); /* ── Lane grid: solid divider lines ── */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(80,65,20,0.4)'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.setLineDash([]); for(var lg=1;lg<LANE_COUNT;lg++){ ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(LANE_W*lg,0); ctx.lineTo(LANE_W*lg,H); ctx.stroke(); } /* ── Hover highlight: glow the lane the mouse is over ── */ if(hoverLane>=0 && !gameOver){ var hx=hoverLane*LANE_W; ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,160,40,0.06)'; ctx.fillRect(hx,0,LANE_W,H); var hGrd=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,H-100,0,H); hGrd.addColorStop(0,'rgba(200,160,40,0)'); hGrd.addColorStop(1,'rgba(200,160,40,0.10)'); ctx.fillStyle=hGrd; ctx.fillRect(hx,H-100,LANE_W,100); } /* ── Click flash: bright pulse on the lane just clicked ── */ if(clickFlash>=0){ var flashAge=Date.now()-clickFlashAt; if(flashAge<300){ var fAlpha=0.18*(1-flashAge/300); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(230,190,60,'+fAlpha+')'; ctx.fillRect(clickFlash*LANE_W,0,LANE_W,H); } else { clickFlash=-1; } } /* ── Lane arrows at bottom (click targets) ── */ if(!gameOver && phase!=='countdown'){ ctx.textAlign='center'; for(var la=0;la<LANE_COUNT;la++){ var isActive=(la===playerLane); var isHover=(la===hoverLane); var alpha=isActive?0.55:(isHover?0.40:0.18); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,160,40,'+alpha+')'; var ax=LANE_X[la], ay=H-18; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(ax,ay-10); ctx.lineTo(ax-14,ay+2); ctx.lineTo(ax-6,ay+2); ctx.lineTo(ax-6,ay+8); ctx.lineTo(ax+6,ay+8); ctx.lineTo(ax+6,ay+2); ctx.lineTo(ax+14,ay+2); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,160,40,'+(isActive?0.6:0.25)+')'; ctx.font=(isActive?'bold ':'')+' 9px monospace'; ctx.fillText(la===0?'LEFT':(la===1?'MID':'RIGHT'), LANE_X[la], H-4); } } /* vignette */ var grd=ctx.createRadialGradient(W/2,H/2,H*0.28,W/2,H/2,H*0.72); grd.addColorStop(0,'rgba(0,0,0,0)'); grd.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0.55)'); ctx.fillStyle=grd; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H); } /* ── Draw the cow + rider (top-down perspective: facing up the screen) ── */ function drawPlayer(){ /* flash/blink during invulnerability */ var invuln=(Date.now()-hitFlashAt < INVULN_TIME) && phase==='real'; if(invuln && Math.floor(Date.now()/80)%2===0) return; /* blink off */ ctx.save(); ctx.translate(playerX, PLAYER_Y); /* red flash overlay on hit */ if(invuln && Date.now()-hitFlashAt < 200){ ctx.globalAlpha=0.6; } /* shadow */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.35)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(2,18,26,10,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* cow body (oval, seen from above/behind) */ ctx.fillStyle='#c89830'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,0,22,28,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* hide patches */ ctx.fillStyle='#b08020'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(-8,-8,9,11,0.4,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(10,6,7,8,-0.3,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* cow head (top – facing forward/up) */ ctx.fillStyle='#d4a840'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-26,14,11,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* ears */ ctx.fillStyle='#b08828'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(-14,-24,5,4,0.5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(14,-24,5,4,-0.5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* horns */ ctx.strokeStyle='#e8d8a0'; ctx.lineWidth=2.5; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-12,-30); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(-18,-38,-14,-42); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(12,-30); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(18,-38,14,-42); ctx.stroke(); /* cow tail (below, trailing behind) */ ctx.strokeStyle='#a88020'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,28); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(4,38,-3,44); ctx.stroke(); /* tuft */ ctx.fillStyle='#c89830'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-3,44,3,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* legs visible below body */ ctx.fillStyle='#a07818'; ctx.fillRect(-18,18,7,10); ctx.fillRect(11,18,7,10); /* hooves */ ctx.fillStyle='#605020'; ctx.fillRect(-18,26,7,4); ctx.fillRect(11,26,7,4); /* ── Rider (sitting on cow, seen from above) ── */ /* legs straddling */ ctx.fillStyle='#5a4a20'; ctx.fillRect(-24,-6,8,16); ctx.fillRect(16,-6,8,16); /* torso */ ctx.fillStyle='#e0b840'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-4,12,14,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* jacket details */ ctx.strokeStyle='#c8a030'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,-18); ctx.lineTo(0,8); ctx.stroke(); /* arms forward (holding cow) */ ctx.fillStyle='#d4a838'; ctx.fillRect(-10,-20,6,10); ctx.fillRect(4,-20,6,10); /* head */ ctx.fillStyle='#e8c860'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,-18,9,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* hat */ ctx.fillStyle='#8a6820'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-22,11,5,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle='#7a5818'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-24,7,4,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.restore(); } /* ── Draw obstacles ── */ function drawObstacle(o){ var t=o.type; ctx.save(); ctx.translate(o.x, o.y); /* shadow */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(2,t.h*0.4,t.w*0.4,6,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); switch(t.name){ case 'REVELLER': /* drunk person stumbling – wobble */ var wx=Math.sin(o.wobble)*4; ctx.translate(wx,0); /* body */ ctx.fillStyle='#6a6a88'; ctx.fillRect(-11,-20,22,34); /* head */ ctx.fillStyle='#8888a0'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,-24,10,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* raised arm with bottle */ ctx.fillStyle='#6a6a88'; ctx.fillRect(10,-28,6,14); ctx.fillStyle='#446644'; ctx.fillRect(12,-36,4,10); /* legs */ ctx.fillStyle='#555570'; ctx.fillRect(-9,14,8,12); ctx.fillRect(1,14,8,12); /* shoes */ ctx.fillStyle='#333344'; ctx.fillRect(-9,24,8,4); ctx.fillRect(1,24,8,4); break; case 'WAITER': /* thin waiter carrying tray */ ctx.fillStyle='#222230'; ctx.fillRect(-9,-22,18,38); /* white shirt front */ ctx.fillStyle='#aaaaaa'; ctx.fillRect(-6,-18,12,20); /* bow tie */ ctx.fillStyle='#882222'; ctx.fillRect(-4,-18,8,4); /* head */ ctx.fillStyle='#9999aa'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,-26,9,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* slicked hair */ ctx.fillStyle='#222230'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-30,9,5,0,Math.PI,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* tray arm extended */ ctx.fillStyle='#222230'; ctx.fillRect(8,-20,14,5); /* tray */ ctx.fillStyle='#c0b090'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(20,-20,10,6,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* glasses on tray */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(150,180,200,0.5)'; ctx.fillRect(17,-26,3,6); ctx.fillRect(21,-24,3,4); /* legs */ ctx.fillStyle='#222230'; ctx.fillRect(-7,16,6,10); ctx.fillRect(1,16,6,10); break; case 'PIG': /* British police pig – custodian helmet, whistle, no star badge */ /* body – round piggy torso in dark Met blue */ ctx.fillStyle='#1e2d4a'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-2,17,19,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* tunic buttons (silver) */ ctx.fillStyle='#b0b8c8'; [-10,-4,2,8].forEach(function(by){ ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,by,1.5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); }); /* belt */ ctx.fillStyle='#1a1a2a'; ctx.fillRect(-17,10,34,5); /* belt buckle */ ctx.fillStyle='#b0b8c8'; ctx.fillRect(-3,10,6,5); /* epaulettes (shoulder pads) */ ctx.fillStyle='#2a3a5a'; ctx.fillRect(-20,-14,8,5); ctx.fillRect(12,-14,8,5); /* collar number */ ctx.fillStyle='#b0b8c8'; ctx.font='bold 5px monospace'; ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillText('273',0,-13); /* pig head */ ctx.fillStyle='#f0b8a8'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-24,14,12,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* pink cheeks */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(220,130,120,0.3)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-8,-22,4,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(8,-22,4,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* snout – big and round */ ctx.fillStyle='#e8a090'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-20,8,6,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* nostrils */ ctx.fillStyle='#c07060'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-3,-20,2.2,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(3,-20,2.2,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* beady eyes */ ctx.fillStyle='#111'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-6,-27,2.5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(6,-27,2.5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* eye highlights */ ctx.fillStyle='#fff'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-5,-28,0.8,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(7,-28,0.8,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* stern eyebrows */ ctx.strokeStyle='#333'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-9,-30); ctx.lineTo(-4,-29); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(9,-30); ctx.lineTo(4,-29); ctx.stroke(); /* jowls */ ctx.fillStyle='#e8b0a0'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(-10,-18,4,3,0.3,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(10,-18,4,3,-0.3,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* ── Custodian helmet (British bobby dome) ── */ /* brim – wide flat oval */ ctx.fillStyle='#0a1428'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-34,16,5,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* helmet body – tall rounded dome */ ctx.fillStyle='#101830'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-12,-34); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(-13,-44,-10,-50); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(-6,-58,0,-60); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(6,-58,10,-50); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(13,-44,12,-34); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); /* helmet ridge/comb running front to back */ ctx.strokeStyle='#182040'; ctx.lineWidth=2.5; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,-60); ctx.lineTo(0,-34); ctx.stroke(); /* helmet badge plate (Brunswick star shape) */ ctx.fillStyle='#c0a840'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-44,5,5,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle='#a89030'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-44,3,3,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* chin strap */ ctx.strokeStyle='#0a1428'; ctx.lineWidth=1.5; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-12,-34); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(-14,-26,-10,-18); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(12,-34); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(14,-26,10,-18); ctx.stroke(); /* pig ears poking out below helmet */ ctx.fillStyle='#e8a898'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(-14,-30,5,6,0.5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(14,-30,5,6,-0.5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* inner ear */ ctx.fillStyle='#d09088'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(-14,-30,3,4,0.5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(14,-30,3,4,-0.5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* whistle on lanyard */ ctx.strokeStyle='#333'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-4,-12); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(-18,-6,-20,2); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle='#b0b8c8'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(-20,2,3,2,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillRect(-22,0,4,5); /* trotters as arms – one raised (directing traffic) */ ctx.fillStyle='#f0b0a0'; ctx.fillRect(-22,-8,8,7); /* right arm raised up */ ctx.fillRect(14,-18,7,8); ctx.fillRect(16,-24,6,8); /* trotter cleft detail */ ctx.strokeStyle='#c07060'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-18,-4); ctx.lineTo(-18,-1); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(19,-20); ctx.lineTo(19,-16); ctx.stroke(); /* legs in dark trousers */ ctx.fillStyle='#0e1a30'; ctx.fillRect(-10,15,9,14); ctx.fillRect(1,15,9,14); /* boots */ ctx.fillStyle='#0a0a14'; ctx.fillRect(-11,27,11,5); ctx.fillRect(0,27,11,5); /* curly tail poking out behind */ ctx.strokeStyle='#f0b0a0'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.lineCap='round'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,16); ctx.bezierCurveTo(8,19,12,14,8,10); ctx.bezierCurveTo(4,6,8,2,12,4); ctx.stroke(); break; case 'BARREL': /* beer barrel rolling */ ctx.fillStyle='#7a5a34'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,16,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* wood grain */ ctx.strokeStyle='#604420'; ctx.lineWidth=1.5; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(0,0,12,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke(); /* bands */ ctx.strokeStyle='#4a3218'; ctx.lineWidth=3; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-16,0); ctx.lineTo(16,0); ctx.stroke(); ctx.strokeStyle='#5a421a'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-14,-8); ctx.lineTo(14,-8); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-14,8); ctx.lineTo(14,8); ctx.stroke(); /* highlight */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,160,80,0.15)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-4,-4,6,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); break; case 'BLACK CAB': /* ══ Classic London Black Cab – SIDE VIEW ══ */ var hw=t.w/2, hh=t.h/2; /* drop shadow */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.35)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(2,hh+2,hw-4,6,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* main body – boxy classic side profile */ ctx.fillStyle='#141420'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-hw+4, hh-10); ctx.lineTo(-hw+4, -hh+16); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(-hw+8, -hh+4, -hw+20, -hh+2); ctx.lineTo(hw-20, -hh+2); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(hw-8, -hh+4, hw-4, -hh+16); ctx.lineTo(hw-4, hh-10); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); /* bonnet – front lower */ ctx.fillStyle='#181828'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-hw+4, hh-10); ctx.lineTo(-hw, hh-10); ctx.lineTo(-hw, -hh+18); ctx.lineTo(-hw+4, -hh+16); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); /* boot – rear lower */ ctx.fillStyle='#181828'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(hw-4, hh-10); ctx.lineTo(hw, hh-10); ctx.lineTo(hw, -hh+18); ctx.lineTo(hw-4, -hh+16); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); /* windows */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(25,40,65,0.7)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-hw+8, -hh+6); ctx.lineTo(-10, -hh+6); ctx.lineTo(-10, -hh+20); ctx.lineTo(-hw+8, -hh+18); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-4, -hh+6); ctx.lineTo(hw-12, -hh+6); ctx.lineTo(hw-8, -hh+18); ctx.lineTo(-4, -hh+20); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); /* B-pillar */ ctx.fillStyle='#141420'; ctx.fillRect(-10, -hh+4, 6, 18); /* chrome window trim */ ctx.strokeStyle='#606878'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-hw+6,-hh+18); ctx.lineTo(hw-6,-hh+18); ctx.stroke(); /* door line + handle */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(40,40,50,0.5)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.5; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-6,-hh+18); ctx.lineTo(-6,hh-12); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle='#707880'; ctx.fillRect(2,-hh+22,6,2); /* headlight */ ctx.fillStyle='#e8d870'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-hw+2, -hh+24, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(232,216,110,0.10)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(-hw-4,-hh+24,8,6,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* tail light + indicator */ ctx.fillStyle='#cc2020'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(hw-2, -hh+24, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle='#e8a030'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(hw-2, -hh+30, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* bumpers */ ctx.fillStyle='#505060'; ctx.fillRect(-hw-1, hh-12, 4, 3); ctx.fillRect(hw-3, hh-12, 4, 3); /* wheels */ ctx.fillStyle='#0a0a14'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-hw+18, hh-8, 9, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(hw-18, hh-8, 9, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='#222230'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-hw+18, hh-8, 9, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(hw-18, hh-8, 9, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle='#404050'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-hw+18, hh-8, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(hw-18, hh-8, 4, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='#505060'; ctx.lineWidth=1; [-hw+18,hw-18].forEach(function(wx){ ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(wx-3,hh-8); ctx.lineTo(wx+3,hh-8); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(wx,hh-11); ctx.lineTo(wx,hh-5); ctx.stroke(); }); /* TAXI sign on roof */ ctx.fillStyle='#d4a830'; ctx.fillRect(-8, -hh-1, 16, 6); ctx.fillStyle='#1a1418'; ctx.font='bold 5px monospace'; ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillText('TAXI',0,-hh+4); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(212,168,48,0.12)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(0,-hh+2,14,8,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* number plate */ ctx.fillStyle='#e8d860'; ctx.fillRect(hw-8, hh-16, 8, 4); ctx.fillStyle='#1a1a20'; ctx.font='bold 3px monospace'; ctx.fillText('73',hw-4,hh-13); break; case 'UBER': /* ══ Modern Uber – SIDE VIEW (same structure as cab but sleeker) ══ */ var uw=t.w/2, uh=t.h/2; /* drop shadow */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.3)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(2,uh+2,uw-4,5,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* main body – silver, lower roofline than cab */ ctx.fillStyle='#b8b8c8'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-uw+4, uh-10); ctx.lineTo(-uw+4, -uh+20); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(-uw+10, -uh+6, -uw+24, -uh+4); ctx.lineTo(uw-28, -uh+4); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(uw-10, -uh+4, uw-4, -uh+14); ctx.lineTo(uw-4, uh-10); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); /* bonnet – front lower, sloped */ ctx.fillStyle='#c0c0d0'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-uw+4, uh-10); ctx.lineTo(-uw, uh-10); ctx.lineTo(-uw+2, -uh+22); ctx.lineTo(-uw+4, -uh+20); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); /* boot – rear, sloped hatchback */ ctx.fillStyle='#acacbc'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(uw-4, uh-10); ctx.lineTo(uw, uh-10); ctx.lineTo(uw, -uh+16); ctx.lineTo(uw-4, -uh+14); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); /* windows – tinted dark, larger */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(15,25,50,0.75)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-uw+12, -uh+8); ctx.lineTo(-8, -uh+8); ctx.lineTo(-8, -uh+22); ctx.lineTo(-uw+10, -uh+22); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-2, -uh+8); ctx.lineTo(uw-16, -uh+8); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(uw-8, -uh+10, uw-6, -uh+18); ctx.lineTo(-2, -uh+22); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fill(); /* B-pillar */ ctx.fillStyle='#b8b8c8'; ctx.fillRect(-8, -uh+6, 6, 18); /* chrome trim along window line */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(200,200,210,0.4)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.5; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-uw+8,-uh+22); ctx.lineTo(uw-6,-uh+22); ctx.stroke(); /* door line + handle */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(150,150,160,0.35)'; ctx.lineWidth=0.5; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-4,-uh+22); ctx.lineTo(-4,uh-12); ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle='#d0d0d8'; ctx.fillRect(4,-uh+26,5,2); /* headlights – thin LED strip */ ctx.fillStyle='#e8e8ff'; ctx.fillRect(-uw, -uh+24, 8, 2); /* DRL accent */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,220,255,0.3)'; ctx.fillRect(-uw, -uh+27, 6, 1); /* tail lights – red LED bar */ ctx.fillStyle='#dd2020'; ctx.fillRect(uw-6, -uh+18, 6, 8); /* tail glow */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(220,30,20,0.10)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(uw+2,-uh+22,6,6,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* bumpers – body colour */ ctx.fillStyle='#a0a0b0'; ctx.fillRect(-uw-1, uh-12, 4, 3); ctx.fillRect(uw-3, uh-12, 4, 3); /* wheels */ ctx.fillStyle='#0a0a14'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-uw+16, uh-8, 8, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(uw-16, uh-8, 8, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='#2a2a34'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-uw+16, uh-8, 8, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(uw-16, uh-8, 8, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke(); /* alloy centres */ ctx.fillStyle='#707080'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(-uw+16, uh-8, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(uw-16, uh-8, 3, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); /* phone glow on dash */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(80,180,255,0.30)'; ctx.fillRect(-uw+14, -uh+12, 4, 3); /* blue U light on windscreen */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(80,180,255,0.20)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(-uw+16,-uh+6,5,3,0,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(80,180,255,0.5)'; ctx.font='bold 5px sans-serif'; ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillText('U',-uw+16,-uh+8); break; } ctx.restore(); } /* ── HUD ── */ function drawHUD(){ if(phase==='title'){ /* dark overlay */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(4,4,12,0.80)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H); ctx.textAlign='center'; /* title */ ctx.fillStyle='#e8c060'; ctx.font='bold 22px serif'; ctx.fillText('RIDE THE COW',W/2,H/2-60); /* flavour text */ ctx.fillStyle='#a08030'; ctx.font='italic 12px serif'; ctx.fillText('Down Dean Street, through the night.',W/2,H/2-34); /* instructions */ ctx.fillStyle='#807028'; ctx.font='11px monospace'; ctx.fillText('\u2190 \u2192 arrow keys or click lane',W/2,H/2+10); ctx.fillText('dodge pigs, cabs & revellers',W/2,H/2+28); ctx.fillText('3 lives \u2013 survive 40 seconds',W/2,H/2+46); /* start prompt */ var pulse=0.5+0.5*Math.sin(Date.now()/400); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(232,192,96,'+pulse+')'; ctx.font='bold 14px monospace'; ctx.fillText('CLICK TO START',W/2,H/2+86); return; } if(phase==='practice'){ /* practice label */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'; ctx.fillRect(W/2-70, 18, 140, 22); ctx.fillStyle='#c89030'; ctx.font='bold 12px monospace'; ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillText('PRACTICE ROUND', W/2, 33); /* ghost timer */ var rem=Math.max(0, PRACTICE_TIME-(Date.now()-phaseStart)); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(140,100,20,0.5)'; ctx.font='10px monospace'; ctx.fillText(Math.ceil(rem/1000)+'s', W/2, 48); /* no-collision note */ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(100,80,20,0.4)'; ctx.font='9px monospace'; ctx.fillText('no collisions \u2013 learn the feel', W/2, H-12); } if(phase==='countdown'){ var elapsed=Date.now()-countdownAt; ctx.fillStyle='rgba(4,4,12,0.65)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H); ctx.textAlign='center'; if(elapsed<800){ ctx.fillStyle='#e8c060'; ctx.font='bold 44px serif'; ctx.fillText('READY',W/2,H/2-10); } else if(elapsed<1600){ ctx.fillStyle='#c89030'; ctx.font='bold 44px serif'; ctx.fillText('SET',W/2,H/2-10); } else { ctx.fillStyle='#e8c060'; ctx.font='bold 52px serif'; ctx.fillText('RIDE!',W/2,H/2-10); } } if(phase==='real'){ /* timer bar at top */ var rem2=Math.max(0, REAL_TIME-(Date.now()-phaseStart)); var pct=rem2/REAL_TIME; var bx=20, by=8, bw=W-40, bh=10; ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.55)'; ctx.fillRect(bx,by,bw,bh); ctx.fillStyle=pct>0.3?'rgba(180,120,20,0.8)':'rgba(220,70,20,0.9)'; ctx.fillRect(bx,by,bw*pct,bh); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(140,90,10,0.5)'; ctx.lineWidth=1; ctx.strokeRect(bx,by,bw,bh); ctx.fillStyle='#c89030'; ctx.font='9px monospace'; ctx.textAlign='center'; /* speed tier indicator */ var el3=Date.now()-phaseStart; var tier2=Math.min(7,Math.floor(el3/5000)); var tierNames=['TROT','CANTER','GALLOP','CHARGE','RAMPAGE','CHAOS','BEDLAM','ARMAGEDDON']; ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'; ctx.fillRect(W/2-36,20,72,14); var tierCol=tier2<2?'#a08030':(tier2<4?'#c87020':(tier2<6?'#e86020':'#ff3020')); ctx.fillStyle=tierCol; ctx.font='bold 9px monospace'; ctx.textAlign='center'; ctx.fillText(tierNames[tier2],W/2,31); ctx.fillText(Math.ceil(rem2/1000)+'s',W/2,by+bh-1); /* lives display – top left */ ctx.textAlign='left'; for(var li=0;li<3;li++){ var lx=8+li*18, ly=24; if(li<lives){ /* filled heart / cow head */ ctx.fillStyle='#e8c060'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(lx,ly,6,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle='#c89830'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(lx,ly,4,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill(); } else { /* empty (lost life) */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(200,120,20,0.3)'; ctx.lineWidth=1.5; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(lx,ly,6,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.stroke(); /* X through it */ ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(220,60,30,0.5)'; ctx.lineWidth=1.5; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(lx-4,ly-4); ctx.lineTo(lx+4,ly+4); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(lx+4,ly-4); ctx.lineTo(lx-4,ly+4); ctx.stroke(); } } } /* controls hint */ if(phase==='practice'||phase==='real'){ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(100,80,20,0.35)'; ctx.font='8px monospace'; ctx.textAlign='right'; ctx.fillText('\u2190\u2192 or click lane',W-8,H-4); } } function drawEnd(){ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(4,4,12,0.85)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H); ctx.textAlign='center'; if(wonGame){ ctx.fillStyle='#e8c060'; ctx.font='bold 28px serif'; ctx.fillText('YOU RODE IT.',W/2,H/2-30); ctx.fillStyle='#a87830'; ctx.font='italic 14px serif'; ctx.fillText('\u201cShe lay beside me',W/2,H/2+2); ctx.fillText('in the dawn.\u201d',W/2,H/2+22); ctx.fillStyle='#786020'; ctx.font='10px monospace'; ctx.fillText('click to continue',W/2,H/2+50); } else { ctx.fillStyle='#8a6030'; ctx.font='bold 28px serif'; ctx.fillText('THROWN.',W/2,H/2-30); ctx.fillStyle='#6a4020'; ctx.font='italic 14px serif'; ctx.fillText('The street wins tonight.',W/2,H/2+2); ctx.fillStyle='#504018'; ctx.font='10px monospace'; ctx.fillText('click to continue',W/2,H/2+50); } } /* ── Input: LEFT/RIGHT ── */ function onKey(e){ if(phase==='title'){ phase='practice'; phaseStart=Date.now(); return; } if(gameOver) return; if(phase==='countdown') return; var now=Date.now(); if(now-lastKeyAt<120) return; if(e.key==='ArrowLeft'||e.key==='a'||e.key==='A'){ if(playerLane>0){ playerLane--; targetX=LANE_X[playerLane]; lastKeyAt=now; } e.preventDefault(); } else if(e.key==='ArrowRight'||e.key==='d'||e.key==='D'){ if(playerLane<LANE_COUNT-1){ playerLane++; targetX=LANE_X[playerLane]; lastKeyAt=now; } e.preventDefault(); } } document.addEventListener('keydown',onKey); /* track mouse hover for lane highlight */ canvas.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){ var r=canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); var cx=(e.clientX-r.left)*(W/r.width); hoverLane=Math.max(0,Math.min(LANE_COUNT-1,Math.floor(cx/LANE_W))); }); canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){ hoverLane=-1; }); canvas.addEventListener('click',function(e){ if(phase==='title'){ phase='practice'; phaseStart=Date.now(); return; } if(gameOver) return; if(phase==='countdown') return; var r=canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); var cx=(e.clientX-r.left)*(W/r.width); var nl=Math.max(0,Math.min(LANE_COUNT-1,Math.floor(cx/LANE_W))); playerLane=nl; targetX=LANE_X[nl]; clickFlash=nl; clickFlashAt=Date.now(); }); canvas.addEventListener('touchstart',function(e){ e.preventDefault(); if(phase==='title'){ phase='practice'; phaseStart=Date.now(); return; } if(gameOver) return; if(phase==='countdown') return; var r=canvas.getBoundingClientRect(); var cx=(e.touches[0].clientX-r.left)*(W/r.width); var nl=Math.max(0,Math.min(LANE_COUNT-1,Math.floor(cx/LANE_W))); playerLane=nl; targetX=LANE_X[nl]; clickFlash=nl; clickFlashAt=Date.now(); },{passive:false}); /* ── Navigate to Harlowe passage ── */ function navigate() { document.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey); var id = wonGame ? 'cow-go-win' : 'cow-go-lose'; var sp = document.getElementById(id); if (sp){ var lk=sp.querySelector('tw-link'); if(lk) lk.click(); } } /* ── Game loop ── */ function loop(){ update(); /* screen shake on hit */ var shaking=(Date.now()-hitFlashAt < 300) && phase==='real' && !gameOver; if(shaking){ var sx=(Math.random()-0.5)*8, sy=(Math.random()-0.5)*8; ctx.save(); ctx.translate(sx,sy); } drawStreet(); obstacles.forEach(drawObstacle); drawPlayer(); /* red flash overlay on hit */ if(Date.now()-hitFlashAt < 200 && phase==='real'){ ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,40,20,0.18)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H); } if(shaking) ctx.restore(); if(!gameOver) drawHUD(); else drawEnd(); requestAnimationFrame(loop); } loop(); })(); </script> Greek, Frith, Dean, Wardour, Berwick, Poland. //Go For Dinner With Billy Piper.// She knows the map. (set: $cowRideWon to true)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence + 12)\ (set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 8) It's coming up! [[Listen|LINE 3]] [[Return to the street|Dean Street]] (set: $confidence to $confidence - 6)\ The beast throws you onto the pissant cobblestones, trots off and never looks back. [[Back to the street|Dean Street]] (if: $lilyCount >= 1 and $hadLilyCall1 is false)[(set: $lilyCallReturn to "Ronnie Scott's")(go-to: "Lily phone call 1")]\ (if: $lilyCount >= 2 and $hadLilyCall1 is true and $hadDualRing is false)[(set: $lilyCallReturn to "Ronnie Scott's")(go-to: "The dual ring")]\ <div class="venue-back-btn">(link: "← Dean Street")[(go-to: "Dean Street")]</div> <div class="ronnies-scene"> <div class="ronnies-spot"></div> <div class="ronnies-cone"></div> (display: "Ronnies Rule SVG h14") (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 9)\ (set: $exploredSinceFrench to true)\ (unless: $visited is a datamap)[(set: $visited to (dm:))]\ (unless: $visited contains "Ronnies")[(set: $visited's Ronnies to false)]\ (if: $visited's Ronnies is false)[(set: $visited's Ronnies to true)] Ronnie Scott's, Ronnie Scott's, just like you pictured it: sky scrapers. Onstage there are two musicians, besides Alcousin. (if: $tookLily3 is false)[|lily3>[(display: "Lily SVG")]\ (click-replace: ?lily3)[(set: $lilyCount to $lilyCount + 1)(set: $tookLily3 to true)(display: "Lily SVG")<span class="lily-glimpse lily-fade">You've the sense, distinct and cordial, that Lily is sitting behind you, and will not look,</span>]](else:)[<div class="lily-taken">(display: "Lily SVG")</div>] (link: "⟡ LORE: Ronnie Scott's ⟡")[<div class="lore-box"> You hear four stories about Ronnie Scotts and half of them are true. 1. My mother and father went one night in the eighties. No particular occasion and they didn't know who was playing. They sat behind the piano; too close for anyone who really wanted to hear it. Nina Simone played that night. 2. Ronnie once gave a pianist a fulsome introduction: Where he'd played and who with; where he'd seen him play and with whom; and nobody came on stage. The band loops twice round the head and still nobody's there. That's the best I've ever heard him, said Ronnie. He was never heard of again. 3. You know about the jam they do upstairs? One night my friend's friend was playing it; a physicist by trade and a brilliant jazz piano player. Partway through his turn someone whispers in his ear: There's a man in the stalls who will take a harmonic solo. The band turned the tune around then grew gentle to wait for him. He comes in: it's Stevie Wonder, it could be no other. I hear he's a very kind man. 4. A man was paying for a scotch when the horn started soloing. He finished his drink, put on his coat, his hat and stepped out into the cold Soho rain to see a woman, returning just as the horn seemed to finish her solo. </div>] There is a pianist with a long and sculpted face, like El Greco painted a heron, and a young guitarist who looks like he was groomed by Bruce Springsteen. Look a little lost boy, get us a drink, will yer? 'Bourbon,' says the guitarist. 'The one with the bird on the label. Tulip glass.' 'Moscow Mule,' says Moe de Alcousin. 'Fresh lime. Not bottled.' 'Scotch,' says the pianist. 'The Macallan. Neat.' (if: $completedSetlist is false)[<span id="sob-data-bar" style="display:none;">(print: $sobriety)</span>\ (display: "Ronnies Rule SVG h14")\ <div class="pp-arena" id="bar-arena"><div class="pp-score" r="2"/></g><g fill="none" stroke="#d4b878" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.35"><path d="M85,22 C90,18 95,18 100,22 L100,48 C95,52 90,52 85,48 Z"/><path d="M300,22 C305,18 310,18 315,22 L315,48 C310,52 style="display:block;overflow:visible;"><defs><linearGradient id="pbGold2" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#b89a60" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#d4b878" stop-opacity="0.9"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#e8cc88" stop-opacity="1"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#d4b878" stop-opacity="0.9"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#b89a60" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="pbBg2" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1c1408" stop-opacity="0.97"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0c0804" stop-opacity="0.99"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="pbRule2" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c9a050" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="25%" stop-color="#c9a050" stop-opacity="0.65"/><stop offset="75%" stop-color="#c9a050" stop-opacity="0.65"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c9a050" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="tulipFill2" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c9a050" stop-opacity="0.45"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#e8c880" stop-opacity="0.65"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c9a050" stop-opacity="0.45"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="copperFill2" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8a5a20"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="#c9883a"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#daa050"/><stop offset="70%" stop-color="#c98838"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8a5a20"/></linearGradient><radialGradient id="pbGlow2" cx="50%" cy="38%" r="40%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#c9a050" stop-opacity="0.07"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#c9a050" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><rect x="10" y="6" width="400" height="260" rx="3" fill="url(#pbBg2)" stroke="rgba(184,154,96,0.32)" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="18" y="14" width="384" height="244" rx="2" fill="url(#pbGlow2)" stroke="rgba(184,154,96,0.13)" stroke-width="0.5"/><!-- LEFT BOTANICAL VINE --><g opacity="0.33" fill="none" stroke="#b89a60" stroke-width="0.85"><path d="M28,95 C27,78 30,60 34,44 C37,35 41,26 38,16"/><path d="M33,70 C29,64 22,62 19,56"/><path d="M31,53 C27,47 29,39 26,32"/><path d="M35,41 C31,35 27,28 30,20"/></g><g opacity="0.38" fill="#b89a60"><path d="M33,70 C31,64 26,67 24,62 C28,61 32,64 33,70 Z"/><path d="M31,53 C29,47 24,49 23,45 C27,44 31,48 31,53 Z"/></g><!-- RIGHT BOTANICAL VINE (mirror) --><g opacity="0.33" fill="none" stroke="#b89a60" stroke-width="0.85"><path d="M392,95 C393,78 390,60 386,44 C383,35 379,26 382,16"/><path d="M387,70 C391,64 398,62 401,56"/><path d="M389,53 C393,47 391,39 394,32"/><path d="M385,41 C389,35 393,28 390,20"/></g><g opacity="0.38" fill="#b89a60"><path d="M387,70 C389,64 394,67 396,62 C392,61 388,64 387,70 Z"/><path d="M389,53 C391,47 396,49 397,45 C393,44 389,48 389,53 Z"/></g><!-- TULIP GLASS (left, cx=148) --><g opacity="0.85"><rect x="147" y="71" width="2" height="17" fill="rgba(200,180,140,0.32)"/><ellipse cx="148" cy="89" rx="10" ry="2.5" fill="rgba(200,180,140,0.26)"/><path d="M140,71 C136,60 133,44 137,33 C140,26 144,21 148,19 C152,21 156,26 159,33 C163,44 160,60 156,71 Z" fill="url(#tulipFill2)" stroke="rgba(220,200,150,0.42)" stroke-width="1.2"/><path d="M138,57 L137,41" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.14)" stroke-width="1.5"/></g><!-- COPPER MUG (centre, cx=220) --><g opacity="0.9"><path d="M233,41 C242,41 244,48 244,53 C244,58 242,65 233,65" fill="none" stroke="#9a6030" stroke-width="2.5"/><rect x="207" y="35" width="26" height="34" rx="2" fill="url(#copperFill2)" opacity="0.8"/><rect x="207" y="35" width="26" height="3" rx="1" fill="rgba(232,184,96,0.52)"/><line x1="208" y1="47" x2="232" y2="47" stroke="rgba(255,220,140,0.15)" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="208" y1="58" x2="232" y2="58" stroke="rgba(255,220,140,0.09)" stroke-width="0.8"/><rect x="208" y="40" width="24" height="28" rx="1" fill="rgba(180,120,40,0.3)"/></g><!-- ROCKS GLASS (right, cx=292) --><g opacity="0.85"><path d="M280,73 L283,47 L301,47 L304,73 Z" fill="rgba(180,170,150,0.22)" stroke="rgba(220,200,160,0.38)" stroke-width="1.2"/><path d="M281,73 L283,58 L301,58 L303,73 Z" fill="rgba(180,120,40,0.4)"/><rect x="286" y="51" width="8" height="7" rx="1" fill="rgba(200,220,255,0.22)" stroke="rgba(200,220,255,0.3)" stroke-width="0.5"/><line x1="284" y1="66" x2="284" y2="51" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.12)" stroke-width="1.5"/></g><!-- Dots between glasses --><g fill="#c9a050" opacity="0.4"><circle cx="170" cy="55" r="1.5"/><circle cx="178" cy="51" r="1"/><circle cx="186" cy="55" r="1.5"/><circle cx="254" cy="55" r="1.5"/><circle cx="262" cy="51" r="1"/><circle cx="270" cy="55" r="1.5"/></g><!-- Divider after glasses --><line x1="28" y1="100" x2="392" y2="100" stroke="url(#pbRule2)" stroke-width="0.75"/><polygon points="210,97 213,100 210,103 207,100" fill="#c9a050" opacity="0.68"/><!-- MAIN TEXT --><text x="210" y="124" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-weight="bold" fill="url(#pbGold2)" style="font-size:10px">Three drinks to pour for the band.</text><text x="210" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-weight="bold" fill="url(#pbGold2)" style="font-size:10px">Then carry the tray to the stage.</text><!-- Inner rule --><line x1="100" y1="158" x2="320" y2="158" stroke="url(#pbRule2)" stroke-width="0.45"/><!-- Control hints --><text x="210" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-style="italic" fill="#8a7a60" style="font-size:8.5px">Hold to pour &#183; Release to stop</text><text x="210" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-style="italic" fill="#8a7a60" style="font-size:8.5px">&#8593; Jump &#183; &#8595; Duck &#183; Mind the gaps</text><!-- Lower divider --><line x1="28" y1="207" x2="392" y2="207" stroke="url(#pbRule2)" stroke-width="0.75"/><!-- Diamond row --><g fill="#c9a050" opacity="0.44"><polygon points="138,219 141,223 138,227 135,223"/><polygon points="159,217 162,221 159,225 156,221"/><polygon points="180,219 183,223 180,227 177,223"/><polygon points="210,214 214,218 210,222 206,218"/><polygon points="240,219 243,223 240,227 237,223"/><polygon points="261,217 264,221 261,225 258,221"/><polygon points="282,219 285,223 282,227 279,223"/></g><!-- Bottom botanical swags --><g opacity="0.2" fill="none" stroke="#b89a60" stroke-width="0.7"><path d="M42,255 C68,245 105,251 135,243 C160,236 176,241 196,236"/><path d="M378,255 C352,245 315,251 285,243 C260,236 244,241 224,236"/></g><!-- Corner L-brackets --><g opacity="0.3" stroke="#b89a60" stroke-width="0.9" fill="none"><polyline points="20,26 20,18 29,18"/><polyline points="400,26 400,18 391,18"/><polyline points="20,250 20,258 29,258"/><polyline points="400,250 400,258 391,258"/></g></svg><div style="text-align:center;padding:0.1em 0 1.2em;"><button id="bar-start-btn" onclick="window.startBarGame()" style="background:linear-gradient(180deg,#241a0a,#130d05);color:#d4b878;border:1px solid rgba(184,154,96,0.55);outline:2px solid rgba(184,154,96,0.1);outline-offset:4px;padding:13px 52px;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:0.95em;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:0.28em;text-transform:uppercase;box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(184,154,96,0.12),0 0 6px rgba(184,154,96,0.06),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06);transition:all 0.2s;">&#9670; Go to the Bar &#9670;</button></div></div><div id="bar-narrative" style="text-align:center;padding:0;min-height:0;font-style:italic;"></div><div id="bar-end" style="text-align:center;padding:0;"></div></div>\ <span id="bar-win-link" style="display:none;">[[Bar Canvas Win]]</span>\ <span id="bar-lose-link" style="display:none;">[[Bar Canvas Lose]]</span>] (else:)[<div class="venue-exhausted">They've played out all they have to play, there's no more here tonight.</div> [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]]] (display: "Ronnies Rule SVG h14") </div> <div class="secrets-tracker"> <strong>PASSWORDS</strong> (if: $knowsCopperWord is true)[<div class="secret-item">⚿ "I said hello" — for Copper(if: $awaitingCopperPwd)[ <button class="nb-deploy-btn" onclick="window.deployPwd('copper')" style="background:#1a0a08;color:#d4a574;border:1px solid #8a4a3a;padding:2px 10px;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:0.8em;cursor:pointer;margin-left:8px;">Deploy</button>]</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ A word for Copper</div>] (if: $knowsCopperSecret is true)[<div class="secret-item">⚿ "Valletta" — Lackland's back room(if: $awaitingLacklandPwd)[ <button class="nb-deploy-btn" onclick="window.deployPwd('lackland')" style="background:#1a0a08;color:#d4a574;border:1px solid #8a4a3a;padding:2px 10px;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:0.8em;cursor:pointer;margin-left:8px;">Deploy</button>]</div>](else:)[<div class="greyed-out">○ A word for Lackland</div>] </div> <!-- Swinging bulb --> <div class="cellar-bulb-wrap"> <svg width="48" height="90" viewBox="0 0 48 90"><!-- Wire from ceiling --><line x1="24" y1="0" x2="24" y2="30" stroke="#888878" stroke-width="1.4" opacity="0.75"/><!-- Socket cap --><rect x="17" y="28" width="14" height="10" rx="2.5"fill="rgba(80,78,65,0.9)" stroke="rgba(160,155,120,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Socket ring detail --><rect x="19" y="36" width="10" height="3" rx="1"fill="none" stroke="rgba(150,145,110,0.55)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Outer glow halo --><ellipse cx="24" cy="60" rx="20" ry="22"fill="rgba(255,245,160,0.12)"/><!-- Bulb body — pear shape, bright and solid --><path d="M24,38 C16,38 10,45 10,55 C10,67 16,78 24,78 C32,78 38,67 38,55 C38,45 32,38 24,38 Z"fill="rgba(255,252,210,0.95)" stroke="rgba(220,210,160,0.6)" stroke-width="0.8"/><!-- Inner warm core --><ellipse cx="24" cy="57" rx="9" ry="11"fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.55)"/><!-- Filament — W-shape --><path d="M18,60 L20,53 L24,58 L28,53 L30,60"fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,200,40,0.95)" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linejoin="round"/><!-- Neck base ring --><rect x="20" y="75" width="8" height="3" rx="1"fill="rgba(200,195,155,0.65)" stroke="none"/></svg> </div> <div class="cellar-scene"> <div class="cellar-light"></div> You don't move. Something in your stillness makes Copper pause. 'Silly bugger.' (set: $confidence to $confidence + 6) For a moment you think he might let you go. Then his eyes harden. [[Brace yourself|Fight starts]] </div> (set: $albaRevealed to false)\ (set: $confidence to 70)\ (set: $sobriety to 70)\ (set: $returns to 0)\ (set: $knowsCopperWord to false) (set: $alba to (a:)) (set: $alba1 to "As cool as the pale wet leaves")\ (set: $alba2 to "of lily-of-the-valley")\ (set: $alba3 to "She lay beside me in the dawn.") (set: $albaGiven to (dm: "red", false, "street2", false, "street3", false)) (set: $visited to (dm: "French", false, "Pillars", false, "Colony", false)) (set: $metRed to false)\ (set: $knowsLackland to false) (set: $haunts to (a:)) (set: $haunt1 to "The Sketch")\ (set: $haunt2 to "The Refusal")\ (set: $haunt3 to "The Beast")\ (set: $haunt4 to "The Debt")\ (set: $haunt5 to "The Game")\ (set: $haunt6 to "The Delivery")\ (set: $haunt7 to "The Head")\ (set: $haunt8 to "The Wound")\ (set: $knowsCopperSecret to false)\ (set: $completedSetlist to false)\ (set: $hasCoin to false)\ (set: $hasDrawing to false)\ (set: $metShana to false)\ (set: $hasTrishaMatchbook to false)\ (set: $knowsCecilCourt to false)\ (set: $hasCleggBeermat to false)\ (set: $knowsAboutPage to false)\ (set: $hasMissingPage to false)\ (set: $returnedPage to false)\ (set: $mapSeen to false)\ (set: $notebookUnlocked to false)\ (set: $knowsRonnies to false)\ (set: $hadPhoneCall to false)\ (set: $mapPosition to "dean")\ (set: $hadBreather to false)\ (set: $exploredSinceFrench to true)\ (set: $hadChippy to false)\ (set: $frenchDrinkDone to false)\ (set: $drankAtFrench to false)\ (set: $wasBeaten to false)\ (set: $visitedInterval to false)\ (set: $cowRideWon to false)\ (set: $afterMidnight to false)\ (set: $lilyCount to 0) (set: $lilyCallCount to 0)\ (set: $hadLilyCall1 to false)\ (set: $hadDualRing to false)\ (set: $coachUrgent to false) (set: $shownVenueHint to false)\ (set: $shownMoraleWarn to false)\ (set: $tookLily1 to false)\ (set: $tookLily3 to false)\ (set: $tookLily4 to false)\ (set: $tookLily5 to false)\ (set: $sawMemory1 to false)\ (set: $sawMemory2 to false)\ (set: $sawMemory3 to false)\ (set: $awaitingCopperPwd to false)\ (set: $awaitingLacklandPwd to false)\ (set: $breatherReturns to 0)\ (set: $metCritic to false)\ (set: $ronniesLastOrders to false)\ (set: $cecilLastOrders to false)\ (set: $trishasLastOrders to false)\ (set: $hauntExplained to false)\ (set: $hasLiver to false)\ (set: $lastDrink to "")\ (set: $opponent to "")\ (set: $fightScore to 0)\ (set: $oppScore to 0)\ (set: $ppScore to 0)\ (go-to: "The Night Ahead") <svg class="carthage-pyre" viewBox="0 0 500 95" width="100%" height="95" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><radialGradient id="cpGlow" cx="50%" cy="85%" r="70%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#d4600a" stop-opacity="0.4"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="#c84a08" stop-opacity="0.2"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#401808" stop-opacity="0.08"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0a0a12" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient><linearGradient id="cpTopFade" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0a0a12" stop-opacity="1"/><stop offset="35%" stop-color="#0a0a12" stop-opacity="0.6"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#0a0a12" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0a0a12" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="cpFade" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#0a0a12" stop-opacity="1"/><stop offset="8%" stop-color="#0a0a12" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="92%" stop-color="#0a0a12" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0a0a12" stop-opacity="1"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="cpGround" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3a2010" stop-opacity="0.5"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1a0a08" stop-opacity="0.3"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="0" y="77" width="500" height="18" fill="url(#cpGround)"/><rect x="0" y="0" width="500" height="95" fill="url(#cpGlow)"/><rect x="195" y="77" width="110" height="6" rx="1" fill="#3a2818" opacity="0.6"/><rect x="205" y="72" width="90" height="6" rx="1" fill="#4a3020" opacity="0.5"/><rect x="215" y="67" width="70" height="6" rx="1" fill="#5a3828" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M220,67 Q210,50 278,67Z" fill="#c04808" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M230,67 Q224,45 237,18 Q242,32 248,8 Q253,28 258,12 Q264,35 270,67Z" fill="#d4600a" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M235,67 Q230,42 242,20 Q246,34 250,12 Q254,30 258,18 Q262,40 265,67Z" fill="#e88020" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M240,67 Q237,44 246,24 Q249,36 252,18 Q255,34 258,26 Q259,42 260,67Z" fill="#ffa040" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M245,67 Q243,48 249,30 Q251,42 253,34 Q254,48 255,67Z" fill="#ffc868" opacity="0.4"/><path d="M222,67 Q216,52 224,35 Q228,45 230,38 Q229,50 232,67Z" fill="#c04808" opacity="0.3"/><path d="M268,67 Q272,50 276,32 Q274,44 278,40 Q276,52 275,67Z" fill="#c04808" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="228" cy="61" r="4.5" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.55"/><rect x="232" y="63" width="32" height="3" rx="1" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M264,63 L266,63 L266,58 L264,58 Z" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M267,63 L269,63 L269,59 L267,59 Z" fill="#1a0a06" opacity="0.45"/><circle cx="245" cy="4" r="0.8" fill="#ffa030" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="260" cy="7" r="0.6" fill="#ff8020" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="238" cy="10" r="0.7" fill="#ffc050" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="268" cy="3" r="0.5" fill="#ff6010" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="252" cy="2" r="0.6" fill="#ffc050" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="230" cy="6" r="0.5" fill="#ff8020" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="272" cy="12" r="0.9" fill="#ffa030" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="242" cy="16" r="0.5" fill="#ffc050" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="256" cy="14" r="0.4" fill="#ff6010" opacity="0.25"/><rect x="80" y="30" width="5" height="47" fill="#705848" opacity="0.45"/><rect x="78" y="28" width="9" height="3" rx="0.5" fill="#806858" opacity="0.5"/><path d="M82,45 L84,55" stroke="#3a2010" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="70" y="74" width="9" height="4" rx="1" fill="#705848" opacity="0.3" transform="rotate(-15,74,76)"/><rect x="405" y="22" width="6" height="55" fill="#705848" opacity="0.4"/><rect x="402" y="20" width="12" height="3" rx="0.5" fill="#806858" opacity="0.45"/><path d="M408,35 Q410,42 407,50 Q410,58 408,65" fill="none" stroke="#d4600a" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.2"/><path d="M415,72 Q420,65 430,72" fill="none" stroke="#705848" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.3"/><rect x="140" y="48" width="3" height="29" fill="#503828" opacity="0.25"/><rect x="350" y="42" width="3" height="35" fill="#503828" opacity="0.2"/><path d="M348,42 L356,42" stroke="#503828" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.15"/><circle cx="180" cy="82" r="0.8" fill="#d4600a" opacity="0.25"/><circle cx="320" cy="80" r="0.6" fill="#c84a08" opacity="0.2"/><circle cx="160" cy="84" r="0.5" fill="#ff8020" opacity="0.15"/><circle cx="340" cy="83" r="0.7" fill="#d4600a" opacity="0.2"/><rect x="0" y="0" width="500" height="95" fill="url(#cpTopFade)"/><rect x="0" y="0" width="500" height="95" fill="url(#cpFade)"/></svg> <div class="dream-sequence"> You stay for an hour or forever. Her pyre burns down while you're close and all through the night, the body in its flames transforms, hanging the Lily-of-the-Valley on your nose that desires it; on the path of an asymptote, to something infinitesimally-not-her. Polybius: What do you mean by England? Why do you damn your country with its name? [[Wake suddenly|The Interval]] </div> As you walk in you see a woman who was a friend of yours years ago, who somehow keeps some part in your affections. Her voice reminds you somebody else you used to see in Soho, who was a friend of John St. John's, when you were all much younger than this. Soho is hers now; she knows all the bouncers. In you go. [[Trisha's|Trisha's]] (display: "French Rule SVG h60") You move towards their table, suspended, as it were, a thumb's-width above the oak floor. They do not look up. You're about to bottle it when somebody speaks your name. Among them is a face you recognise and he's greeting you now. He is a Spaniard from El Rocío, in Andalusia, named Benito de los Juncales del Oeste. He painted you and Ashton Granger once, when you were lovers, years ago in Cordoba. <div class="verse"> My mediaeval knees lack health until they bend,<br> But in that woman, in that household where<br> Honour had lived so long, all lacking found.<br> Childless I thought, 'My children may find here<br> Deep-rooted things,' but never foresaw its end,<br> And now that end has come I have not wept;<br> No fox can foul the lair the badger swept. </div> You think of this, from Spenser and from Yeats, as you say hello. [[Sit with him|The Spanish Artist]] (display: "French Rule SVG h24")</svg> (set: $metCritic to true)\ <style> .script-line { margin: 0.6em 0; padding-left: 3em; text-indent: -3em; } .script-speaker { font-variant: small-caps; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #c8a86a; margin-right: 0.75em; } </style> <div class="pillars-scene"> <div class="pillars-light"></div> <div class="pillars-smoke"></div> <div class="pillars-dust"><span style="left:12%;bottom:18%;animation-duration:7s;animation-delay:0s;"></span><span style="left:32%;bottom:8%;animation-duration:9.5s;animation-delay:1.2s;"></span><span style="left:52%;bottom:28%;animation-duration:6.5s;animation-delay:2.8s;"></span><span style="left:72%;bottom:5%;animation-duration:11s;animation-delay:0.4s;"></span><span style="left:22%;bottom:38%;animation-duration:8.5s;animation-delay:1.8s;"></span><span style="left:82%;bottom:22%;animation-duration:10s;animation-delay:3.5s;"></span><span style="left:42%;bottom:12%;animation-duration:7.8s;animation-delay:0.8s;"></span><span style="left:62%;bottom:32%;animation-duration:9s;animation-delay:2.2s;"></span></div> <!-- Left broken pillar — Piranesi/Decline & Fall style --> <svg class="pillar left" viewBox="0 0 34 280" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMax meet"><defs><linearGradient id="pf" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.72"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.42"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><!-- Two-step plinth base --><rect x="1" y="252" width="32" height="8" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><rect x="4" y="246" width="26" height="7" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Shaft edges (slight taper: 24px wide at top, 26px at base) --><line x1="5" y1="246" x2="6" y2="88" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><line x1="29" y1="246" x2="28" y2="88" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><!-- Drum course bands every 22px --><line x1="5.3" y1="110" x2="28.7" y2="110" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="132" x2="28.5" y2="132" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="154" x2="28.5" y2="154" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="176" x2="28.5" y2="176" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="198" x2="28.5" y2="198" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="220" x2="28.5" y2="220" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="242" x2="28.5" y2="242" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="0.65"/><!-- Faint fluting --><line x1="10" y1="88" x2="10" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="14" y1="88" x2="14" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="17" y1="88" x2="17" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="20" y1="88" x2="20" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="24" y1="88" x2="24" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><!-- Echinus (curved capital swell) --><path d="M6,88 Q5,78 3,72 L31,72 Q29,78 28,88" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf)" stroke-width="1.1"/><!-- Abacus slab — CRACKED, left portion collapsed inward --><!-- Right surviving portion: tilting down-left --><path d="M12,72 L32,68 L33,63 L13,66 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><!-- Left fallen piece: a slab lying at an angle, partly off the shaft --><path d="M2,74 L-2,70 L8,67 L11,72 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.45"/><!-- Fracture line across shaft top --><path d="M6,88 L9,83 L13,87 L17,80 L21,86 L25,79 L28,88" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.55"/><!-- A fallen drum section leaning against the shaft at ~1/3 height --><path d="M1,168 L3,160 L9,162 L9,170 L3,172 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.85" opacity="0.32"/><!-- Crack on shaft face --><path d="M13,130 L15,142 L12,150" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.28"/><!-- Rubble at base --><path d="M3,255 L9,255 L10,260 L2,260 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.28"/><path d="M21,257 L28,257 L29,262 L20,261 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M13,260 L18,259 L19,264 L12,263 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.2"/></svg> <!-- Right pillar — same shape, scaleX(-1) mirrors it so break faces inward --> <svg class="pillar right" viewBox="0 0 34 280" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMax meet"><defs><linearGradient id="pf2" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.72"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0.42"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8ac8dc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs><rect x="1" y="252" width="32" height="8" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><rect x="4" y="246" width="26" height="7" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1"/><!-- Shorter shaft: top at y=130 instead of y=88 — this pillar more ruined --><line x1="5" y1="246" x2="6" y2="130" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><line x1="29" y1="246" x2="28" y2="130" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><line x1="5.5" y1="152" x2="28.5" y2="152" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="174" x2="28.5" y2="174" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="5.5" y1="196" x2="28.5" stroke-width="0.65"/><line x1="10" y1="130" x2="10" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="14" y1="130" x2="14" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><line x1="24" y1="130" x2="24" y2="245" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.22"/><!-- Echinus at top of shorter shaft --><path d="M6,130 Q5,120 3,114 L31,114 Q29,120 28,130" fill="none" stroke="url(#pf2)" stroke-width="1.1"/><!-- This column: abacus has COLLAPSED entirely — jagged stump and tilted block --><path d="M3,114 L6,107 L10,112 L14,104 L18,110 L22,102 L27,108 L31,114" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6"/><!-- Large fallen capital block --><path d="M2,106 L-3,98 L14,94 L17,104 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5"/><!-- Fracture running down shaft --><path d="M6,130 L9,125 L13,129 L17,122 L21,128 L25,121 L28,130" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.9" opacity="0.55"/><path d="M9,142 L11,158 L8,164" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.28"/><!-- Fallen drum leaning against shaft --><path d="M1,215 L3,207 L9,209 L9,217 L3,219 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.85" opacity="0.3"/><!-- Rubble at base --><path d="M3,255 L9,255 L10,260 L2,260 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.8" opacity="0.28"/><path d="M22,257 L29,257 L30,262 L21,261 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.22"/><path d="M11,260 L17,259 L18,264 L10,263 Z" fill="none" stroke="#8ac8dc" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.2"/></svg> <!-- Lattice pub window at top --> <svg class="pillars-lattice" viewBox="0 0 300 36" width="100%" height="36" preserveAspectRatio="none"><defs><linearGradient id="latEdge" x1="0" x2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0"/><stop offset="15%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="85%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0.55"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7ab8cc" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient><pattern id="dLat" x="0" y="0" width="42" height="24" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse"><path d="M7,0 L14,12 L7,24 L0,12 Z" fill="rgba(160,35,25,0.26)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M21,0 L28,12 L21,24 L14,12 Z" fill="rgba(185,215,235,0.07)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M35,0 L42,12 L35,24 L28,12 Z" fill="rgba(28,108,52,0.22)" stroke="#5a96aa" stroke-width="1" stroke-linejoin="round"/></pattern><mask id="latMask"><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" fill="url(#latEdge)"/></mask></defs><rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" fill="url(#dLat)" mask="url(#latMask)"/><line x1="0" y1="34" x2="300" y2="34" stroke="url(#latEdge)" stroke-width="1.2"/></svg> (set: $sobriety to $sobriety - 9)\ (set: $confidence to $confidence - 9) You meet him, at the bar with a big scotch in one hand and a fag in the other. He's getting a round in. <p class="script-line"><span class="script-speaker">Him.</span> 'Pint of Guinness, double whisky, twice, and a gin and... no, you say it.'</p> <p class="script-line"><span class="script-speaker">You.</span> '…and Bitter Lemon.'</p> You move to his table and place your drink on a little vacant patch among his papers. 'I like books…' <br> [['… but I don't like all this drinking.'|None of us likes it!]] [['… but I don't like poetry.'|None of us likes it!]] </div> <div class="colony-scene"> <svg class="colony-corner tl" viewBox="0 0 36 36"><path d="M3,34 L3,8 Q3,3 8,3 L34,3" fill="none" stroke="#6a9a50" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.7"/><path d="M7,34 L7,12 Q7,7 12,7 L34,7" fill="none" y1="54" x2="300" y2="0" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.7"/></g><path d="M60,20 Q105,12 150,10 Q195,12 240,20" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.18"/><path d="M30,30 Q90,22 y2="47" stroke="url(#cfL)" stroke-width="1.8"/><line x1="0" y1="50" x2="300" y2="50" stroke="url(#cfL)" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.3"/><polygon points="150,40 155.5,45 150,50 144.5,45" fill="#c8b860" opacity="0.6"/><polygon points="150,42 153,45 150,48 147,45" fill="#e0d080" opacity="0.2"/><polygon points="120,44 123,47 120,50 117,47" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.4"/><polygon points="180,44 183,47 180,50 177,47" fill="none" stroke="#7aaa60" stroke-width="0.7" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="95" cy="47" r="0.8" fill="#8a9a50" opacity="0.35"/><circle cx="205" cy="47" r="0.8" fill="#8a9a50" opacity="0.35"/></svg> (set: $confidence to $confidence + 18)\ (set: $sobriety to $sobriety + 12) 'You write, too?' she says, having never written anything in her life that anyone's read and looks over your shoulder. You leave and as you go, she presses something small into your palm. Via the gents, the night sharpens. Things seem possible again. As you leave, you remember, wholly and as a single thought: Ronnie Scott's, you had forgotten it was there. (set: $knowsRonnies to true) <span class="guided-link">[[You remember that Ronnie Scott's is open and close.|Approach Ronnie Scott's]]</span> [[Back to Dean Street|Dean Street]] <svg
